news.Title: жҺЁи«–иҲҮд»ЈзҗҶAIиҲҲиө· дҫӣжҮүйҸҲж·»еҲ©
news.Content:
AIз”ўжҘӯжӯЈеҫһеӨ§еһӢжЁЎеһӢиЁ“з·ҙиҪүеҗ‘жҺЁи«–иҲҮAgentic AIпјҲд»ЈзҗҶAIпјүпјҢдҪҝеҫ—жҺЁи«–йҒӢз®—йңҖжұӮеӨ§йҮҸеўһй•·пјҢеҗҢжҷӮд№ҹжҺЁйҖІеӨҡд»ЈзҗҶдәәпјҲMulti-agentпјүзі»зөұеҝ«йҖҹиҲҲиө·гҖӮDIGITIMESз ”иӘҝжҢҮеҮәпјҢд»Ҡе№ҙиө·AIзЎ¬й«”йңҖжұӮе°ҮеҮәзҸҫе°ҚHBMй »еҜ¬еҸҠе®№йҮҸгҖҒCPUйҒӢз®—иғҪеҠӣпјҢиҲҮе°Ҳз”ЁеҠ йҖҹеҷЁгҖҒеҰӮLPUпјҲиӘһиЁҖиҷ•зҗҶе–®е…ғпјүзҡ„е°Һе…ҘзӯүйңҖжұӮпјҢжӢүжҠ¬иў«й»һеҗҚзҡ„зӣёй—ңдҫӣжҮүйҸҲеҸ°е» пјҢеҰӮеҠӣз©Қйӣ»пјҲ6770пјүгҖҒиҸҜйӮҰйӣ»пјҲ2344пјүзӯүеҸ—й—ңжіЁгҖӮ

AIжҠҖиЎ“жһ¶ж§Ӣзҡ„иҪүеҗ‘пјҢй җжңҹе°ҮдҪҝеҫ—AIзЎ¬й«”зҡ„з“¶й ёеҫһйҒҺеҫҖGPUзҡ„гҖҢеҗ‘дёҠж“ҙеұ•пјҲScale-upпјүгҖҚй«ҳйҖҹдә’йҖЈиғҪеҠӣпјҢиҪүз§»еҲ°еҠ йҖҹеҷЁзҡ„HBMй »еҜ¬иҲҮе®№йҮҸзҡ„дёҚж•·дҪҝз”ЁпјҢеҗҢжҷӮзі»зөұе°Қж–јCPUеҸҠиЁҳжҶ¶й«”йғҪе°ҮжҳҺйЎҜеўһеҠ зҡ„иІ иҚ·пјҢеё¶дҫҶе°ҚAIй«ҳйҖҹйҒӢз®—зҡ„ж–°дёҖжіўзЎ¬й«”йңҖжұӮпјҢиҖҢйҖҷд№ҹе°Үи®“CPUиҲҮиЁҳжҶ¶й«”зҡ„з”ўдҫӣйҮҸиғҪжҢҒзәҢеңЁд»Ҡе№ҙжҲҗзӮәеҗ„ж–№й—ңжіЁз„Ұй»һгҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢзӮәзӘҒз ҙжҺЁи«–ж•ҲиғҪзҡ„жҘөйҷҗпјҢ йҖҸйҒҺзөҗеҗҲдёҚеҗҢзү№жҖ§зҡ„зЎ¬й«”дҫҶиҷ•зҗҶжҺЁи«–зҡ„дёҚеҗҢз’°зҜҖпјҢзІҫзҙ°жӢҶи§ЈжҺЁи«–д»»еӢҷд»ҘеҠ еҝ«дёҰжҸҗеҚҮжӯЈзўәзҺҮпјҢе°Һе…ҘGroqзҡ„LPUпјҲиӘһиЁҖиҷ•зҗҶе–®е…ғпјүйҖҷйЎһеҠ йҖҹеҷЁдҫҶе°Ҳй–Җиҷ•зҗҶFFNпјҲеүҚйҘӢзҘһз¶“з¶Іи·ҜпјүжҲ–е°Ҳе®¶жЁЎеһӢпјҲMoEпјүзҡ„йҒӢз®—пјҢиғҪжңүж•ҲйҷҚдҪҺе»¶йҒІдёҰйҒ”жҲҗжӣҙеҝ«зҡ„Tokenз”ўеҮәйҖҹеәҰгҖӮ

NVIDIAз”«ж–јж—ҘеүҚзҡ„GTCдёҠжӯЈејҸе®ЈеёғпјҢе°Үж–°дёҖд»Јзҡ„Groq 3 LPUзҙҚе…Ҙд»Ҡе№ҙе°ҮжҺЁеҮәйҮҸз”ўзҡ„иҝӯд»ЈVera Rubinе№іеҸ°пјҢд№ҹеё¶еӢ•зӣёй—ңдҫӣжҮүйҸҲеҰӮеҠӣз©Қйӣ»гҖҒиҸҜйӮҰйӣ»гҖҒйҲәеүөпјҲ5351пјүиҲҮж„ӣжҷ®пјҲ6531пјүзӯүеҸ°е» еқҗж“Ғж–°дёҖжіўAIйЎҢжқҗгҖӮ

йҖІе…ҘеӨҡд»ЈзҗҶдәәпјҲMulti-agentпјүзі»зөұдё–д»ЈеҫҢпјҢд№ҹе°Үеё¶еӢ•CSPйӣІз«Ҝе·Ёй ӯзҡ„AIеҹәе»әжҺЎиіјзӯ–з•Ҙд»Ҙйӣҷи»ҢйғЁзҪІNVIDIAиҲҮиҮӘз ”ASICжҷ¶зүҮеңЁе…§зҡ„AIдјәжңҚеҷЁгҖӮ

DIGITIMESи§ҖеҜҹпјҢNVIDIAзҡ„й«ҳйҡҺж©ҹж«ғзҙҡAIдјәжңҚеҷЁзі»зөұпјҲеҰӮNVL72пјүд»ҚжҳҜе…өе®¶еҝ…зҲӯзҡ„еёӮе ҙдё»жөҒпјҢдҪҶеӨ§еһӢCSPйқўе°ҚйҫҗеӨ§зҡ„AIйҒӢз®—йңҖжұӮпјҢз©ҚжҘөйғЁзҪІжҗӯијүй«ҳй »еҜ¬иЁҳжҶ¶й«”пјҲHBMпјүзҡ„й«ҳйҡҺAIдјәжңҚеҷЁпјҢд№ҹжҠ•е…Ҙе°Ҳеұ¬зҡ„иҮӘз ”ASICжҷ¶зүҮйӣІз«ҜжңҚеӢҷгҖӮ

дё”з”ұж–јз•¶еүҚж•ҙй«”AIз®—еҠӣд»ҚеҡҙйҮҚдёҚи¶іпјҢйҒҺеҫҖйӣҶдёӯз”ұеӨ§еһӢCSPжҸҗдҫӣAIйӣІз«ҜйҒӢз®—жңҚеӢҷзҡ„йҮҸиғҪе·ІдёҚж•·дҪҝз”ЁпјҢж–°иҲҲзҡ„AIж–°еүөжҘӯиҖ…еҰӮOpenAIгҖҒAnthropicзӯүжҘӯиҖ…пјҢд№ҹе·Ій–Ӣе§Ӣжү“з ҙеҺҹжңүеёғеұҖпјҢдёҚеғ…зӣҙжҺҘеҗ‘GoogleзӯүеӨ§е» жҺЎиіјзЎ¬й«”пјҢз”ҡиҮіи‘—жүӢиҰҸз•«е»әзҪ®иҮӘжңүзҡ„еҜҰй«”иіҮж–ҷдёӯеҝғгҖӮ

й җжңҹйҖҷдәӣйғҪе°ҮжҢҒзәҢзӮәеҸ°зӣёй—ңAIзЎ¬й«”дҫӣжҮүйҸҲжҘӯиҖ…з№јзәҢжҢ№жіЁеҫҢеёӮеҮәиІЁеӢ•иғҪеҸҠзҮҹйҒӢжҲҗй•·еҲ©еӨҡгҖӮ

news.Title: йҷӨжҒҜж—әеӯЈдҫҶдәҶ 23жӘ”еҸ°иӮЎETFжҺҘеҠӣзҷјжҒҜ
news.Content:
4жңҲеҸ°иӮЎETFйҷӨжҒҜж—әеӯЈжӯЈејҸеұ•й–ӢпјҢеҗёеј•еёӮе ҙиіҮйҮ‘жҸҗеүҚеҚЎдҪҚпјҢзөұиЁҲ4жңҲе°ҮйҷӨжҒҜе…ұ23жӘ”пјҢе…¶дёӯжңҖй«ҳй җдј°е№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮйҒ”18пј…д»ҘдёҠпјҢзёҪиЁҲжңүе…ӯжӘ”й җдј°е№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮйҖҫ10пј…пјҢйЎҜзӨәеңЁеёӮе ҙйңҮзӣӘиҲҮеҲ©зҺҮз’°еўғд»Қе…·дёҚзўәе®ҡжҖ§дёӢпјҢе…·з©©е®ҡзҸҫйҮ‘жөҒзү№жҖ§зҡ„ETFжҢҒзәҢеҸ—еҲ°жҠ•иіҮдәәйқ’зқһгҖӮ

и§ҖеҜҹжң¬ж¬Ў4жңҲй…ҚжҒҜETFдёӯпјҢд»Ҙж°ёиұҗеҸ°зҒЈESGпјҲ00888пјүй җдј°е№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮ18.19пј…еұ…еҶ пјҢжҲҗзӮәжң¬жіўж®–еҲ©зҺҮжңҖе…·еҗёеј•еҠӣзҡ„з„Ұй»һпјӣе…¶ж¬ЎзӮәзҫӨзӣҠеҚҠе°Һй«”ж”¶зӣҠпјҲ00927пјүпјҢй җдј°е№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮйҒ”15.54пј…пјӣдёӯдҝЎиҮәзҒЈжҷәж…§50пјҲ00912пјүиҲҮFTиҮәзҒЈSMARTпјҲ00905пјүпјҢе№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮеқҮйҖҫ12пј…пјҢйЎҜзӨәе…·з”ўжҘӯж”¶зӣҠиҲҮзӯ–з•ҘеһӢйҒёиӮЎзү№иүІзҡ„ETFпјҢд»ҚжҳҜеёӮе ҙиіҮйҮ‘еёғеұҖзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒжЁҷзҡ„пјӣеҸҰеӨ–пјҢе…ғеӨ§й«ҳиӮЎжҒҜпјҲ0056пјүйҖҷж¬Ўй җдј°жҜҸе–®дҪҚй…ҚжҒҜ1е…ғпјҢе№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮйҒ”10.5пј…пјҢдҫқиҲҠз¶ӯжҢҒеёӮе ҙдәәж°ЈпјӣеҚҠе№ҙй…Қзҡ„иҒҜйӮҰеҸ°зІҫеҪ©50пјҲ009804пјүе№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮд№ҹиЎқдёҠ10пј…гҖӮ

еҫһй…ҚжҒҜй »зҺҮи§ҖеҜҹпјҢжңҲй…ҚеһӢETFд»ҚеҚ еӨҡж•ёпјҢйЎҜзӨәеёӮе ҙе°Қз©©е®ҡзҸҫйҮ‘жөҒзҡ„йңҖжұӮжҢҒзәҢеҚҮжә«гҖӮйҖҷж¬ЎеҗҚе–®дёӯеҢ…жӢ¬еҫ©иҸҜеҸ°зҒЈз§‘жҠҖе„ӘжҒҜпјҲ00929пјүгҖҒдёӯдҝЎжҲҗй•·й«ҳиӮЎжҒҜпјҲ00934пјүгҖҒеҜҢйӮҰзү№йҒёй«ҳиӮЎжҒҜ30пјҲ00900пјүеҸҠе…ғеӨ§еҸ°зҒЈеғ№еҖјй«ҳжҒҜпјҲ00940пјүзӯүеӨҡжӘ”жңҲй…ҚETFпјҢй җдј°е№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮеӨҡиҗҪеңЁ5пј…иҮі8пј…еҚҖй–“гҖӮ

йҖҷж¬ЎйҷӨжҒҜеҗҚе–®дёӯдәҰеҸҜиҰӢз§‘жҠҖеһӢETFжҢҒзәҢеҸғиҲҮй…ҚжҒҜиЎҢеҲ—пјҢдҫӢеҰӮеҜҢйӮҰз§‘жҠҖпјҲ0052пјүжҺЎе№ҙй…Қж–№ејҸпјҢжң¬ж¬ЎжҜҸе–®дҪҚй…ҚжҒҜ1.199е…ғпјҢйӣ–е№ҙеҢ–й…ҚжҒҜзҺҮеғ…зҙ„2.68пј…пјҢдҪҶеӣ жҢҒиӮЎеӨҡзӮәз§‘жҠҖж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎпјҢй•·жңҹиіҮжң¬еўһеҖјжҪӣеҠӣд»Қе…·еҗёеј•еҠӣпјӣеҸ°ж–°иҮәзҒЈICиЁӯиЁҲпјҲ00947пјүиҲҮеҮұеҹәеҸ°зҒЈAI50пјҲ00952пјүзӯүиҒҡз„ҰеҚҠе°Һй«”иҲҮAIз”ўжҘӯзҡ„ETFпјҢд№ҹйҖҸйҒҺй…ҚжҒҜж©ҹеҲ¶жҸҗеҚҮжҠ•иіҮеҗёеј•еҠӣпјҢйЎҜзӨәз§‘жҠҖйЎҢжқҗиҲҮж”¶зӣҠзӯ–з•ҘйҖҗжӯҘиһҚеҗҲпјҢжҲҗеёӮе ҙж–°и¶ЁеӢўгҖӮ

еұ•жңӣеҫҢеёӮпјҢжҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәиӘҚзӮәпјҢйҡЁETFз”ўе“ҒиЁӯиЁҲж—ҘзӣҠеӨҡе…ғпјҢжңӘдҫҶй«ҳиӮЎжҒҜETFе°Үжңқеҗ‘зөҗеҗҲAIгҖҒеҚҠе°Һй«”еҸҠESGзӯүдё»йЎҢзҷјеұ•пјҢеҗҢжҷӮжҗӯй…ҚжңҲй…ҚиҲҮеӯЈй…ҚзӯүдёҚеҗҢж©ҹеҲ¶пјҢд»Ҙж»ҝи¶ідёҚеҗҢжҠ•иіҮж—ҸзҫӨйңҖжұӮгҖӮ

news.Title: иҝ‘еҚҒе№ҙжё…жҳҺзҜҖеҫҢ еҸ°иӮЎжјІзӣёдҪі
news.Content:
жё…жҳҺзҜҖйҖЈзәҢеҒҮжңҹйҒҺеҫҢпјҢжӯ·е№ҙиіҮж–ҷйЎҜзӨәпјҢжё…жҳҺе°ҚеҸ°иӮЎзӣӨеӢўеҪұйҹҝдёҚеӨ§гҖӮжҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәиЎЁзӨәпјҢиҝ‘еҚҒе№ҙжё…жҳҺзҜҖеҫҢеҸ°иӮЎеҗ„жңҹй–“е№іеқҮиЎЁзҸҫйғҪжӯЈе ұй…¬пјҢдёҠжјІж©ҹзҺҮе№іеқҮиҝ‘8жҲҗпјҢдҪҶд»Ҡе№ҙеӣ зӮәжңүзҫҺд»ҘдјҠжҲ°зҲӯи®Ҡж•ёпјҢеҸ°иӮЎе°ҮиҲҮеңӢйҡӣеёӮе ҙйҖЈеӢ•пјҢе»әиӯ°д»ҘеҸ°иӮЎдё»еӢ•ејҸETFж”»е®Ҳе…јеӮҷзҡ„йқҲжҙ»ж“ҚдҪңзү№жҖ§пјҢи¶ҒеҸ°иӮЎжӢүеӣһжҷӮйҖўдҪҺеҲҶжү№еёғеұҖгҖӮ

дё»еӢ•зҫӨзӣҠз§‘жҠҖеүөж–°пјҲ00992AпјүETFз¶“зҗҶдәәйҷіжңқж”ҝжҢҮеҮәпјҢеӨ§зӣӨзӣ®еүҚй«ҳжӘ”йңҮзӣӘжҠ•иіҮйӣЈеәҰй«ҳгҖҒйўЁйҡӘж©ҹжңғдёҰеӯҳпјҢеҸ°иӮЎзҸҫйҡҺж®өд»ӨжҠ•иіҮдәәеҫҲйӣЈжҚүж‘ёпјҢзөұиЁҲиҝ‘еҚҒе№ҙжё…жҳҺзҜҖеүҚеҫҢеҸ°иӮЎеӨ§зӣӨиЎЁзҸҫпјҢд»Ҙе№іеқҮе ұй…¬зҺҮдҫҶзңӢпјҢеүҚеҫҢеҗ„жңҹй–“йғҪжҳҜжӯЈе ұй…¬иЎЁзҸҫпјҢж•ёж“ҡйЎҜзӨәжё…жҳҺзҜҖдёҰз„Ўи®ҠзӣӨд№ӢеӢўпјҢжҠ•иіҮдәәдёҚеҝ…йҒҺеәҰж“”жҶӮгҖӮ

йӣ–з„¶зҸҫйҡҺж®өжҳҜз¬¬дәҢеӯЈеҲқпјҢйҖўе№ҙе ұи·ҹеӯЈе ұзҡ„е…¬еёғжңҹпјҢеҠ дёҠд»Ҡе№ҙзҡ„дёӯжқұең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»йўЁйҡӘдәӮжөҒдёҚж–·пјҢеҸ°иӮЎд№ҹйӣЈйҖғеӨ§жјІеӨ§и·Ңж…ӢеӢўпјҢдҪҶе…ЁзҗғAIиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәжҲҗй•·жңүж©ҹжңғи¶…йҒҺ70пј…пјҢеӣ еңӢйҡӣAIиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәеј·еҠӣзҒҢжіЁпјҢеҸ°зҒЈз¶“жҝҹжҲҗй•·зҺҮеҫҲеҸҜиғҪи¶…йҒҺеҺ»е№ҙ8.42пј…зҡ„дә®зңјиЎЁзҸҫгҖӮAIд»ҚжҳҜеёӮе ҙй—ңжіЁзҡ„ж ёеҝғжҠ•иіҮдё»йЎҢпјҢеҸҜйҮҚй»һй—ңжіЁйӣ»еҠӣгҖҒж•ЈзҶұиҲҮй«ҳйҖҹеӮіијёдёүеӨ§й ҳеҹҹпјҢжҢҒзәҢзңӢеҘҪгҖӮ

дё»еӢ•дёӯдҝЎеҸ°зҒЈеҚ“и¶ҠпјҲ00995Aпјүз¶“зҗҶдәәејөжӣёе»·иӘҚзӮәпјҢзӣ®еүҚзңӢеҘҪзҡ„йҮҚй»һжқҝеЎҠеҢ…жӢ¬еҚҠе°Һй«”иЁӯеӮҷгҖҒијүжқҝгҖҒдёҠжёёеҺҹзү©ж–ҷгҖҒж•ЈзҶұгҖҒе…үйҖҡиЁҠиҲҮдҪҺи»ҢиЎӣжҳҹпјҢдёҰжңғйҒ©еәҰжҗӯй…Қе…·еӮҷжҲҗй•·жҪӣеҠӣзҡ„жҲҗзҶҹAIиҲҮICиЁӯиЁҲе…¬еҸёгҖӮжӯӨеӨ–д№ҹйҖҸйҒҺиіЈеҮәиІ·ж¬ҠпјҲCall OptionsпјүдҫҶж”¶еҸ–ж¬ҠеҲ©йҮ‘гҖӮйҖҷй …ж“ҚдҪңиғҪеңЁиӮЎеёӮдёӢжҢ«жңҹй–“жҸҗдҫӣйЎҚеӨ–зҡ„зҸҫйҮ‘жөҒйҳІиӯ·пјҢе…јйЎ§зҹӯз·ҡйўЁйҡӘз®ЎзҗҶиҲҮй•·жңҹзҡ„еӨҡй ӯеёғеұҖгҖӮ

е®үиҒҜеҸ°зҒЈеӨ§еЈ©еҹәйҮ‘з¶“зҗҶдәәи•ӯжғ дёӯеј·иӘҝпјҢзҸҫйҡҺж®өеёӮе ҙзјәд№Ҹж–№еҗ‘пјҢеёӮе ҙжғ…з·’жӣҙе®№жҳ“еҸҚжҮүз·ҠејөеұҖеӢўиҲҮжІ№еғ№иө°еӢўпјӣеңЁи§ҖеҜҹй»һдёҠпјҢдёӯжқұжғ…еӢўиҶ и‘—зүҪеӢ•жІ№еғ№иҲҮйҖҡиҶЁпјҢе°ұеҫҢеёӮзҷјеұ•еҸҜе…Ҳи§ҖеҜҹ4жңҲ6ж—ҘгҖҒд№ҹе°ұжҳҜзҫҺеңӢзёҪзөұе·қжҷ®е®ЈеёғеҺҹе®ҡж–ј27ж—ҘеҲ°жңҹгҖҒеҫҢеұ•е»¶еҚҒеӨ©зҡ„е…Ёйқўй–Ӣж”ҫиҚ·иҺ«иҢІжө·еіҪжңҖеҫҢйҖҡзү’ж—Ҙзҷјеұ•пјӣеҸҰдёҖеҖӢжҳҜиҒҜжә–жңғж–°д»»дё»еёӯ5жңҲдёҠд»»еҫҢеҸҜиғҪйҮӢеҮәзҡ„ж”ҝзӯ–ж…ӢеәҰгҖӮ

news.Title: еҸ°иӮЎETFзҶұ 2еӨ§дё»йЎҢжңҖеҗёйҮ‘
news.Content:
еҸ°иӮЎETFд»Ҡе№ҙеңЁеёӮе ҙеӨ§е№…йңҮзӣӘдёӢеұ•зҸҫеј·еӨ§зҡ„еҗёйҮ‘йӯ…еҠӣпјҢжҺЁеҚҮж•ҙй«”иҰҸжЁЎжҢҒзәҢжҲҗй•·пјҢзөұиЁҲйҰ–еӯЈж•ҙй«”еҸ°иӮЎETFеўһеҠ 6,191е„„е…ғпјҢжҺЁеҚҮж•ҙй«”иҰҸжЁЎзӘҒз ҙ4.5е…Ҷе…ғеӨ§й—ңпјҢе…¶дёӯеёӮеҖјеһӢгҖҒдё»еӢ•еһӢжҲҗзӮәжҺЁеҚҮеҸ°иӮЎETFиҰҸжЁЎдё»иҰҒеҠҹиҮЈгҖӮ

зөұиЁҲз¬¬дёҖеӯЈиҰҸжЁЎеўһеҠ жңҖеӨҡзҡ„еҸ°иӮЎETFд»Ҙе…ғеӨ§еҸ°зҒЈ50пјҲ0050пјүеұ…еҶ пјҢе–®еӯЈиҰҸжЁЎеўһеҠ й«ҳйҒ”3,379е„„е…ғпјҢиІўзҚ»дәҶдёҖеҚҠд»ҘдёҠзҡ„ж•ҙеӯЈиҰҸжЁЎеўһй•·пјӣе…¶ж¬ЎзӮәиЁҙжұӮгҖҢдёҚй…ҚжҒҜзҡ„0050гҖҚзҡ„еҮұеҹәеҸ°зҒЈTOP50пјҲ009816пјүпјҢд»Ҡе№ҙд»Ҙй»‘йҰ¬д№Ӣе§ҝжҲҗзӮәеҸ°иӮЎETFеёӮе ҙзҡ„з„Ұй»һпјҢйҰ–еӯЈиҰҸжЁЎеўһеҠ 837е„„е…ғеұ…ж¬Ўпјӣж—ҘеүҚжҲҗзӮәеңӢе…§йҰ–жӘ”иҰҸжЁЎз ҙеҚғе„„е…ғзҡ„дё»еӢ•зөұдёҖеҸ°иӮЎеўһй•·пјҲ00981AпјүеҹәйҮ‘пјҢе–®еӯЈиҰҸжЁЎеўһеҠ д№ҹи¶…йҒҺ500е„„е…ғгҖӮ

жҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәеҲҶжһҗпјҢи§ҖеҜҹд»Ҡе№ҙд»ҘдҫҶеҸ°иӮЎETFиҰҸжЁЎжҢҒзәҢжҲҗй•·зҡ„еҺҹеӣ пјҢйҰ–е…ҲиҲҮиіҮйҮ‘жҢҒзәҢжөҒе…ҘеёӮеҖјеһӢETFеҜҶеҲҮзӣёй—ңгҖӮеңЁеёӮе ҙжіўеӢ•еҠ еҠҮгҖҒеҖӢиӮЎйҒёиӮЎйӣЈеәҰжҸҗеҚҮзҡ„з’°еўғпјҢжҠ•иіҮдәәжӣҙеӮҫеҗ‘д»ҘеӨ§еһӢж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎзӮәж ёеҝғй…ҚзҪ®пјҢйҖҸйҒҺеёӮеҖјеһӢETFеҸғиҲҮеҸ°иӮЎй•·жңҹжҲҗй•·ж©ҹжңғпјҢзү№еҲҘжҳҜеңЁAIгҖҒй«ҳж•ҲиғҪйҒӢз®—пјҲHPCпјүеҸҠеҚҠе°Һй«”з”ўжҘӯй•·з·ҡи¶ЁеӢўеё¶еӢ•дёӢпјҢзӣёй—ңж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎе…·еӮҷз”ўжҘӯз«¶зҲӯеҠӣиҲҮеҹәжң¬йқўж”Ҝж’җпјҢдҪҝеёӮеҖјеһӢETFжҲҗзӮәиіҮйҮ‘йҒҝйңҮиҲҮй•·жңҹжҠ•иіҮзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒе·Ҙе…·гҖӮ

жҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәжҢҮеҮәпјҢдё»еӢ•ејҸETFеҝ«йҖҹеҙӣиө·пјҢжҲҗзӮәд»Ҡе№ҙжҺЁеҚҮж•ҙй«”иҰҸжЁЎеҸҰдёҖеӨ§еј•ж“ҺпјҢйҡЁжҠ•иіҮдәәе°ҚгҖҢе…је…·ETFдәӨжҳ“дҫҝеҲ©жҖ§иҲҮдё»еӢ•йҒёиӮЎеҪҲжҖ§гҖҚз”ўе“ҒжҺҘеҸ—еәҰжҸҗй«ҳпјҢдё»еӢ•ејҸETFйҖҗжјёеҗёеј•еҺҹжң¬жҠ•иіҮдё»еӢ•еһӢе…ұеҗҢеҹәйҮ‘жҲ–еҖӢиӮЎзҡ„иіҮйҮ‘иҪүе…ҘгҖӮе°Өе…¶еӣ еҸ°иӮЎз”ўжҘӯијӘеӢ•еҠ йҖҹгҖҒйЎҢжқҗеӨҡе…ғеҢ–з’°еўғпјҢдё»еӢ•ејҸETFеҸҜдҫқеёӮе ҙи¶ЁеӢўйқҲжҙ»иӘҝж•ҙжҢҒиӮЎпјҢжҸҗдҫӣзӣёе°Қж–јиў«еӢ•еһӢETFжӣҙе…·еҪҲжҖ§зҡ„жҠ•иіҮзӯ–з•ҘгҖӮ

news.Title: жі•иӘӘжңғеҖ’ж•ёпјҢйӣҷзҺӢжңӘжј”е…ҲиҪҹеӢ•пјҒеҸ°з©Қйӣ» Q1зҮҹж”¶жӢҡз©©е…Ҷе…ғ
news.Content:
жҷ¶ең“д»Је·ҘйҫҚй ӯеҸ°з©Қйӣ»е°Үж–ј4жңҲ16ж—ҘеҸ¬й–Ӣжі•иӘӘжңғпјҢйҡЁи‘—AIйңҖжұӮеј·еӢҒпјҢеӨ–з•ҢзңӢеҘҪеҸ°з©Қйӣ»е°Үз· зҮҹйҒӢж–°жүүй ҒпјҢйҰ–еӯЈзҮҹж”¶иҰҸжЁЎжҢҒзәҢз«ҷз©©е…Ҷе…ғеӨ§й—ңгҖӮжі•дәәиӘҚзӮәпјҢеҚіе°Үе…¬еёғзҡ„3жңҲеҗҲдҪөзҮҹж”¶жңүжңӣеҶҚеҜ«жӯ·еҸІж–°й«ҳпјҢеҗҢжҷӮй—ңжіЁйҰ–еӯЈжҜӣеҲ©зҺҮиЎЁзҸҫеҸҠж“ҙз”ўйҖІеәҰпјҢдёҰжңҹеҫ…и‘ЈдәӢй•·йӯҸе“Іе®¶е°ҚAIйңҖжұӮзҡ„жңҖж–°зңӢжі•гҖӮ

дҪңзӮәAIжҷ¶зүҮиЈҪйҖ йўЁеҗ‘зҗғпјҢеёӮе ҙе°ҚеҸ°з©Қйӣ»йҰ–еӯЈзҮҹйҒӢеҜ„дәҲеҺҡжңӣгҖӮеҫһйҰ–еӯЈиІЎжё¬и§ҖеҜҹпјҢе·ІеҸҜзңӢеҮәйңҖжұӮеј·еӢҒд№Ӣз«ҜеҖӘпјӣе…¶дёӯпјҢеҗҲдҪөзҮҹж”¶д»ҘзҫҺе…ғиЁҲз®—зӮә346е„„иҮі358е„„зҫҺе…ғпјҢиӢҘд»ҘеҢҜзҺҮ31.6е…ғж–°еҸ°е№ЈиЁҲз®—пјҢзҮҹж”¶зӣ®жЁҷзҙ„иҗҪеңЁ1е…Ҷ933.6е„„е…ғиҮі1е…Ҷ1,312.8е„„е…ғгҖӮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»д»Ҡе№ҙеүҚе…©еҖӢжңҲеҗҲдҪөзҮҹж”¶йҒ”7,189.12е„„е…ғпјҢжҸӣиЁҖд№ӢпјҢеҸӘиҰҒдёүжңҲеҗҲдҪөзҮҹж”¶йҒ”4,200е„„е…ғпјҢеҚіиғҪйҒ”иІЎжё¬й«ҳжЁҷж°ҙжә–гҖӮ

AIзӣёй—ңйңҖжұӮе·ІеҫһGPUе»¶дјёиҮіASICгҖҒз¶ІйҖҡжҷ¶зүҮиҲҮCPUпјҢеё¶еӢ•еҸ°з©Қйӣ»иЁӮе–®иғҪиҰӢеәҰйЎҜи‘—жӢүй•·гҖӮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»й җдј°пјҢ2026е№ҙеҸҲжңғжҳҜеј·еӢҒжҲҗй•·зҡ„дёҖе№ҙпјҢиӢҘд»ҘзҫҺе…ғиЁҲпјҢе…Ёе№ҙзҮҹж”¶й җиЁҲжҲҗй•·жҺҘиҝ‘3жҲҗгҖӮ

дҫӣжҮүйҸҲеҲҶжһҗпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»жҲҗй•·еӢ•иғҪдё»иҰҒдҫҶиҮӘе…ҲйҖІиЈҪзЁӢжҢҒзәҢж”ҫйҮҸгҖӮе°Өе…¶е…ҲйҖІиЈҪзЁӢ3гҖҒ2еҘҲзұійңҖжұӮеј·еӢҒпјҢй җжңҹ2027е№ҙN3иҲҮN2з”ўиғҪе°ҮеҲҶеҲҘе№ҙеўһ30пј…пҪһ40пј…еҸҠзҝ»еҖҚжҲҗй•·пјҢдёҰеңЁAIжҷ¶зүҮе°Һе…ҘдёӢпјҢеё¶еӢ•ж•ҙй«”з”ўе“Ғзө„еҗҲе„ӘеҢ–гҖӮе…¶дёӯпјҢN2жӣҙиў«иҰ–зӮәжңӘдҫҶжңҖеӨ§зҮҹж”¶дҫҶжәҗзҜҖй»һпјҢж“ҡжӮүпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»N3PеңЁеҠҹиҖ—иЎЁзҸҫе„Әж–јз«¶зҲӯе°ҚжүӢд№Ӣ2еҘҲзұіпјҢйЎҜзӨәе…¶е…ҲйҖІиЈҪзЁӢдҪҚеұ…й ҳе…Ҳең°дҪҚгҖӮ

е„ҳз®Ўж¶ҲиІ»жҖ§йӣ»еӯҗйӣңйҹій »еӮіпјҢжүӢж©ҹSoCиЁӮе–®иҗҺзё®пјҢз„¶AI GPUиҲҮASICе®ўжҲ¶йңҖжұӮжңӘиҰӢзҶ„зҒ«пјӣдё»иҰҒе®ўжҲ¶еҢ…жӢ¬ијқйҒ”гҖҒи°·жӯҢиҲҮAWSзӯүзҡҶеҠ йҖҹе°Һе…Ҙе…ҲйҖІиЈҪзЁӢпјҢеё¶еӢ•еҸ°з©Қйӣ»иЁӮе–®з©©е®ҡжҲҗй•·гҖӮжӯӨеӨ–пјҢCPUе§”еӨ–и¶ЁеӢўдәҰзӮәеҸҰдёҖжҪӣеңЁдёҠиЎҢеӢ•иғҪгҖӮ

жі•дәәй җжңҹпјҢе®ўжҲ¶е°ҚеҸ°з©Қйӣ»з”ўиғҪд»Қиҷ•дҫӣдёҚжҮүжұӮд№ӢзӢҖж…ӢпјҢд№ҹиҝ«дҪҝеҸ°з©Қйӣ»еҠ йҖҹиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәжҠ•е…ҘгҖҒе°ҮйҒ”дёҠз·Ј560е„„зҫҺе…ғпјӣеҸ°зҒЈе»әе» жҢүиҰҸз•«йҖІиЎҢгҖҒзҫҺеңӢе» еүҮжңүж©ҹжңғжҸҗеүҚйҒ”жЁҷпјҢP3е» ж–јдёӢеҚҠе№ҙй–Ӣе§ӢйҖІиЎҢдё»зі»зөұиЈқж©ҹпјҢд»Ҙж»ҝи¶іе®ўжҲ¶йңҖжұӮгҖӮ

жҘӯз•Ңй»һеҮәпјҢз”ұж–јеҸ°з©Қйӣ»з”ўиғҪжңүйҷҗпјҢе·ІжңүеӨ–жәўиЁӮе–®жөҒе…ҘдёүжҳҹгҖҒиӢұзү№зҲҫпјҢдёҚйҒҺпјҢеңЁAIй•·жңҹи¶ЁеӢўжңӘи®ҠдёӢпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»д»Қе…·еӮҷй«ҳжҲҗй•·иҲҮй«ҳиғҪиҰӢеәҰе„ӘеӢўпјҢжң¬ж¬Ўжі•иӘӘжңғе°Үе»¶зәҢй«ҳйҖҹжҲҗй•·еҹәиӘҝпјҢзӮәAIеүҚжҷҜжіЁе…ҘдёҖеҠ‘еј·еҝғйҮқгҖӮ

news.Title: еҚ—еҸ°зҒЈеӮіз”ў жҗӯеҚҠе°Һй«”й ҶйўЁи»Ҡ
news.Content:
иҝ‘е№ҙеҸ°зҒЈз§‘жҠҖз”ўжҘӯжҺӣеёҘпјҢеӮізөұз”ўжҘӯзҮҹйҒӢзӣёе°ҚиүұиҫӣпјҢжғҹеҚ—еҸ°зҒЈжңүеӨҡе®¶дёӯе°ҸеһӢеӮіз”ўдёҠеёӮж«ғе…¬еҸёпјҢеӣ е…·жңүйӣ»еӯҗзҙҡжә¶еҠ‘гҖҒе»әе» йҳІиқ•еЎ—ж–ҷгҖҒе·ҘжҘӯз”ЁеӨ©з„¶ж°ЈгҖҒзІҫеҜҶйҒҺжҝҫеҷЁжқҗзӯүеҲ©еҹәз”ўе“ҒпјҢжҗӯдёҠеҚҠе°Һй«”дҫӣжҮүйҸҲжҲ–йҖұйӮҠй—ңйҖЈзҡ„й ҶйўЁи»ҠпјҢзҮҹйҒӢзӣёе°Қдә®зңјгҖӮ

ж°ёиЁҳйҖ жјҶеҺ»е№ҙзҮҹж”¶97.84е„„е…ғеүөж–°й«ҳпјҢдёүеӨ§дё»иҰҒзҡ„зҮҹж”¶дҫҶжәҗпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬е»әзҜүеЎ—ж–ҷпјҢе…¬е…ұе·ҘзЁӢгҖҒйӣ»еӯҗе» жҲҝзҡ„еЎ—ж–ҷйңҖжұӮпјҢж°ёиЁҳзёҪз¶“зҗҶејөиұҗеҲ©иЎЁзӨәпјҢеңЁжҲҝз”ўеёӮе ҙдҪҺиҝ·д№ӢйҡӣпјҢеҚҠе°Һй«”зӯүз§‘жҠҖе» жҲҝзҡ„иҲҲе»әпјҢжҲҗзӮәжӢүеҚҮж°ёиЁҳзҮҹж”¶зҡ„ж–°еӢ•иғҪгҖӮ

еҸ°з©Қйӣ»еңЁй«ҳйӣ„еӨ§иҲүжҠ•иіҮе»әе» пјҢдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еӨ©з„¶ж°Јд№ҹеё¶еӢ•ж¬Јй«ҳзҡ„зҮҹж”¶иЎЁзҸҫгҖӮж¬Јй«ҳзҮҹж”¶дҫҶжәҗжң¬д»Ҙе®¶з”ЁгҖҒе•ҶжҘӯз”ЁеӨ©з„¶ж°ЈзӮәдё»пјҢиҲҮиҪ„еҚҖдҪҚж–јеҺҹй«ҳйӣ„зёЈгҖҒд»Ҙе·ҘжҘӯз”Ёж°ЈзӮәеӨ§е®—зҡ„ж¬Јйӣ„дёҚеҗҢпјҢдёҚйҒҺеӣ еҸ°з©Қйӣ»й«ҳйӣ„е» дҪҚж–јжҘ жў“еҚҖпјҢеұ¬ж–јеҗҲдҪөеүҚзҡ„еҺҹй«ҳйӣ„еёӮпјҢдҫҝз”ұж¬Јй«ҳдҫӣжҮүгҖӮ

ж—ӯз„¶еҸ—жғ ж–јжҷ¶ең“д»Је·ҘиҲҮиЁҳжҶ¶й«”зӯүеҚҠе°Һй«”зӣёй—ңз”ўжҘӯпјҢе°Қж–јй«ҳжҪ”ж·ЁеәҰйҒҺжҝҫз”ўе“Ғзҡ„йңҖжұӮеўһеҠ пјҢж—ӯз„¶зёҪз¶“зҗҶдҪ•е®ңз‘ҫиЎЁзӨәпјҢйҡЁи‘—AIжҮүз”ЁиҲҮй«ҳж•ҲиғҪйҒӢз®—йңҖжұӮпјҢжҢҒзәҢжҺЁеҚҮе…ЁзҗғеҚҠе°Һй«”з”ўжҘӯжҠ•иіҮеӢ•иғҪпјҢеӨҡе®¶еҚҠе°Һй«”иҲҮй«ҳз§‘жҠҖйӣ»еӯҗе®ўжҲ¶пјҢжӯЈж–јжӯҗзҫҺгҖҒжқұеҚ—дәһеҸҠж—Ҙжң¬зӯүең°еҠ йҖҹж–°е» е»әзҪ®гҖҒиҲҮз”ўз·ҡж“ҙе……пјҢе°ҮжҲҗж—ӯз„¶д»Ҡе№ҙзҡ„зҮҹж”¶еҲ©еҹәгҖӮ

еҚҠе°Һй«”иЈҪзЁӢжүҖйңҖзҡ„йӣ»еӯҗжә¶еҠ‘пјҢжҝҖеӢөеӢқдёҖеҢ–е·ҘеҺ»е№ҙзҮҹж”¶зҚІеҲ©йӣҷеүөж–°й«ҳгҖӮеӢқдёҖзҷјиЁҖдәәй»ғжңүж…¶иЎЁзӨәпјҢе…¬еҸёз”ўе“Ғжңүе·ҘжҘӯз”Ёжә¶еҠ‘иҲҮйӣ»еӯҗзҙҡжә¶еҠ‘пјҢйҡЁи‘—еҚҠе°Һй«”йңҖжұӮеўһжә«пјҢйӣ»еӯҗзҙҡжә¶еҠ‘зҮҹж”¶еҚ жҜ”е·ІеҫһйҒҺеҺ»зҡ„60пј…пјҢжӢүеҚҮеҲ°и¶…йҒҺ70пј…пјҢжҲҗзӮәеӢқдёҖзҮҹж”¶зҡ„дё»иҰҒеӢ•иғҪгҖӮ

еңӢзІҫеҢ–иҲҮеҚҠе°Һй«”зӣёй—ңзҡ„з”ўе“ҒпјҢеүҮжҳҜUVе…үеӣәеҢ–жқҗж–ҷгҖҒ5GеҢ–еӯёжқҗж–ҷгҖӮжі•дәәиЎЁзӨәпјҢйҡЁи‘—AIжөӘжҪ®дёӢзҡ„AIдјәжңҚеҷЁеёӮе ҙпјҢиҰҸжЁЎеҝ«йҖҹеӨ§е№…жҲҗй•·пјҢеңӢзІҫеҢ–зҡ„й«ҳй »еҹәжқҝжқҗж–ҷпјҢе°ҮжҲҗзӮәжңӘдҫҶзҡ„зҮҹж”¶йҮҚеҝғд№ӢдёҖгҖӮ

news.Title: Intel Targets Amazon, Google on AI Chip Packaging
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Intel ( NASDAQ:INTC ) has held ongoing discussions with Amazon ( NASDAQ:AMZN ) and ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Intel (INTC) is in discussions with Amazon (AMZN) and Google (GOOG) about adopting its advanced chip packaging services.
вҖў These talks are part of Intel's strategy to secure external customers for its packaging technology, a crucial component of its foundry business.
вҖў Intel's EMIB and EMIB-T packaging methods are designed for improved power efficiency and space savings compared to Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing's (TSM) offerings.
вҖў The demand for advanced chip packaging is significantly boosted by artificial intelligence workloads.
news.Keywords: chip packaging, foundry business, AI, advanced technology, manufacturing, customer engagement

news.Title: JPMorgan Sticks To Bearish Tesla Call
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) is back in JPMorgan's crosshairs, with ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў JPMorgan reiterated an Underweight rating and a $145 price target on Tesla (TSLA), implying ~60% downside.
вҖў The bank lowered its Q1 EPS estimate to $0.30 from $0.43, below the $0.38 consensus.
вҖў Full-year 2026 outlook reduced from $2.00 to $1.80 per share, below the $1.95 consensus.
вҖў Concerns include softer deliveries, lower energy storage installations, and valuation risks.
news.Keywords: Underweight rating, price target, EPS estimate, delivery miss, energy storage, valuation risk

news.Title: Nvidia-Backed Data Center Builder Firmus Raises $505 Million
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Data center builder Firmus Technologies Pty raised $505 million in an investment round led by Coatue Management LLC, part of a global push to finance artificial intelligence infrastructure. The deal values the Australian startup at $5.5 billion, Firmus said ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Data center builder Firmus Technologies raised $505 million in a round led by Coatue Management, valuing the startup at $5.5 billion.
вҖў Nvidia Corp. also participated in the round, with funds allocated for deploying AI hardware based on Nvidia technology in the Asia-Pacific region.
вҖў Firmus is developing AI data center capacity in Australia using renewable energy, housing 36,000 Nvidia accelerator chips.
вҖў Nvidia is backing companies that are also customers, aiming to cultivate the AI industry.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, data center, venture capital, Nvidia, renewable energy, market development

news.Title: 2 reasons why Microsoft stock has been shredded
news.Content: Some of the headwinds that have plowed through Microsoft's ( MSFT ) stock are unlikely to abate in the near term. Goldman Sachs analyst Gabriela Borges pinned the company's 23% plunge this year to two factors in a new note on Monday. First, upward revisions to capital expenditures without commensurate upward revisions to Azure cloud sales. This ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Microsoft's (MSFT) stock has fallen 23% this year due to upward revisions in capital expenditures without commensurate Azure cloud sales increases.
вҖў This raises concerns about ROI and Azure's competitive positioning against peers like Amazon's AWS.
вҖў Ongoing concerns exist that Microsoft's business applications may be disrupted by AI competition like Anthropic's Claude Cowork.
вҖў Investors are focused on Microsoft's $37.5 billion capex for data centers, potentially pressuring profit margins.
news.Keywords: capital expenditure, Azure growth, competitive positioning, AI competition, profit margins, data center investment

news.Title: Why Micron Stock Is Sinking Today
news.Content: Micron (NASDAQ: MU) stock is seeing a substantial bullish uptick in Monday's trading. The artificial intelligence ( AI ) memory-chip leader's share price was up 3.4% as of 3:15 p.m. ET. At the same point in the day's trading, the S&P 500 had risen 0.3%, and the Nasdaq Composite was up 0.5%. ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Micron (MU) stock is experiencing a bullish uptick, rising 3.4%, driven by hopes of de-escalation in the Iran conflict.
вҖў The stock has shown significant volatility but is up approximately 33% year-to-date.
вҖў Micron is benefiting from positive momentum in the broader market.
вҖў Near-term stock movements are expected to be closely tied to developments concerning the Iran situation.
news.Keywords: market sentiment, geopolitical risk, stock performance, AI memory, year-to-date performance, volatility

news.Title: Nvidia acquisition of SchedMD sparks worry among AI specialists about software access
news.Content: By Max A. Cherney and Stephen Nellis TORONTO/SAN FRANCISCO, April 6 (Reuters) - A niche acquisition by Nvidia has raised concerns among artificial-intelligence and supercomputer specialists who see the move as a test of the biggest AI chip company's commitment to maintaining a fair playing field for chip rivals and AI data center builders. Nvidia вҖҢlast December announced it would acquire SchedMD, giving it control of open-source software called Slurm, which schedules computing tasks and is ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Nvidia's acquisition of SchedMD, which controls the Slurm workload scheduler software, raises concerns among AI specialists.
вҖў There are fears Nvidia may favor its own chips in software updates over rivals like AMD.
вҖў Slurm software is critical for training large language models and is used in about 60% of supercomputers worldwide.
вҖў Nvidia states its commitment to providing free, open-source, vendor-neutral software for all customers.
news.Keywords: AI software, workload scheduler, open source, competitive concerns, supercomputing, market fairness

news.Title: Exclusive-Amazon says it has reached deal with US Postal Service on package deliveries
news.Content: By David Shepardson WASHINGTON, April 6 (Reuters) - Amazon.com said Monday it has reached a вҖҢnew agreement with the U.S. Postal Service ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Amazon has reached a new agreement with the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) on package deliveries.
вҖў The deal will allow Amazon to retain approximately 80% of its existing deliveries with USPS, exceeding 1 billion packages annually.
вҖў Amazon previously criticized USPS plans to auction access to its last-mile delivery network and threatened to reduce its business.
вҖў Amazon represented $6 billion in annual revenue for USPS.
news.Keywords: package delivery, logistics partnership, USPS, e-commerce, revenue stream, supply chain

news.Title: AMD Stock Pullback: Is Now the Time to Buy for Big Gains or Should You Avoid the Dip?
news.Content: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) have moderated after a solid rally over the past year. Although the stock remains up about 157% over the last 12 months, it has retreated more than 18% from its all-time high of $267.08. Broader macroeconomic and geopolitical uncertainty continues to weigh on investor sentiment and may continue to keep the stock volatile in the short term. However, AMDвҖҷs outlook remains strong, suggesting ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў AMD's stock has retreated over 18% from its all-time high but presents a buying opportunity for long-term investors.
вҖў Growth is driven by EPYC and Ryzen processors and expansion in the data center AI segment.
вҖў Demand trends remain favorable across data center, PC, gaming, and embedded systems.
вҖў Wall Street analysts have a 'Strong Buy' consensus rating with an average price target projecting 28% upside.
news.Keywords: stock pullback, buying opportunity, data center AI, revenue growth, analyst consensus

news.Title: Why Lennar Corporation Stock Fell 24.1% In March
news.Content: Shares of Lennar Corporation (NYSE: LEN) fell 24% in March, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . Homebuilders in the United States have been crushed by rising input costs and declining demand, forcing them to cut prices to move inventory. The stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Lennar Corporation (LEN) shares fell 24% in March due to rising input costs and declining demand in the homebuilding sector.
вҖў Revenue missed Wall Street estimates at $6.6 billion, declining from $7.6 billion a year ago.
вҖў The average selling price of a Lennar home fell to $374,000 from $408,000 a year ago, impacting gross margins to 15.2%.
вҖў Investors are concerned about elevated mortgage rates straining affordability and impacting earnings.
news.Keywords: homebuilding, input costs, declining demand, revenue miss, gross margin, mortgage rates

news.Title: зҶұй–ҖиӮЎпјҸе…¬иӮЎпјӢеӨ–иіҮйӣҷзұҢзўјиӯ·жҢҒгҖҖеҸ°иӮЎ15жӘ”й»һе°Ү
news.Content:
иІЎз¶“дёӯеҝғпјҸе»–зҸӘеҰӮе ұе°Һ

йҮқе°Қиҝ‘жңҹзӣӨеӢўпјҢPGIMдҝқеҫ·дҝЎйҮ‘ж»ҝж„ҸеҹәйҮ‘з¶“зҗҶдәәйғӯжҳҺзҺүжҢҮеҮәпјҢе…ЁзҗғйҮ‘иһҚеёӮе ҙе…ЁзҡҶиҰ–зҫҺдјҠжҲ°зҲӯдҪ•жҷӮеҒңзҒ«д»ҘеҸҠжІ№еғ№иө°еӢўиҖҢжіўеӢ•пјҢеҸ°иӮЎд№ҹеңЁеңӢйҡӣеёӮе ҙиЎқж“ҠдёӢеҮәзҸҫеӨ§е№…йңҮзӣӘпјҢй җжңҹеңЁзҫҺдјҠйӣҷж–№жңӘжӯЈејҸж’Өе…өеүҚпјҢд»Қй ҲжҢҒзәҢжҸҗйҳІиЎҢжғ…жіўеӢ•пјҢдёҚйҒҺеҫһжӯ·еҸІз¶“й©—дҫҶзңӢпјҢең°з·ЈиЎқзӘҒе°ҚиӮЎеёӮиЎқж“ҠеӨҡдёҚиҮҙжј”и®ҠжҲҗй•·жңҹеҪұйҹҝпјҢеҸ°иӮЎзӣ®еүҚеӣһжё¬еӯЈз·ҡдҪҚзҪ®пјҢеҸҚиҖҢеҸҜиҰ–зӮәиүҜеҘҪзҡ„еҲҶжү№йҖІе ҙеёғеұҖжҷӮй»һгҖӮ

еӨ–иіҮйҖЈдә”йҖұжҸҗж¬ҫйҖҫеҚғе„„пјҡеҸ°иӮЎйҖұз·ҡйҖЈе…©й»‘пјҢеҶҚеәҰи·Ңз ҙдёүиҗ¬дёүеҚғй»һеӨ§й—ң

йҖұеӣӣеҸ°иӮЎз”ұзҙ…зҝ»й»‘пјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң602.39й»һпјҢи·Ңе№…-1.82%пјҢж”¶еңЁ32572.43й»һпјҢеҶҚеәҰи·Ңз ҙ33000й»һеӨ§й—ңпјӣжң¬йҖұеҸ°иӮЎйҖұз·ҡзәҢи·Ң540.16й»һпјҢйҖұз·ҡйҖЈ2й»‘пјҢи·Ңе№…-1.63%пјҢе№іеқҮж—ҘеқҮйҮҸ7270.11е„„е…ғгҖӮйӣ–з„¶жң¬йҖұдәӨжҳ“ж—Ҙеғ…4еӨ©пјҢдҪҶеӨ–иіҮиіЈи¶…йҮ‘йЎҚзӣёијғеүҚйҖұж“ҙеӨ§пјҢйҖЈзәҢз¬¬5йҖұиіЈи¶…1601.26е„„е…ғпјҢиҮӘзҮҹе•Ҷд№ҹйҖЈ6йҖұз«ҷеңЁиіЈж–№пјҢе–®йҖұиіЈи¶…197.84е„„е…ғпјҢжң¬йҖұеҶҚеәҰеғ…жҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәз«ҷеңЁиІ·ж–№пјҢйҖЈзәҢ8йҖұиІ·и¶…248.75е„„е…ғпјҢдёүеӨ§жі•дәәеҗҲиЁҲиіЈи¶…1550.36е„„е…ғгҖӮ

еңӢе®¶йҡҠйҖўдҪҺйҖІе ҙиӘҝзҜҖпјҡе…«еӨ§иЎҢеә«ж”ңжүӢеӨ–иіҮпјҢеҠ зўјиҸҜеҹҺзӯүеҚҒдә”жӘ”еҖӢиӮЎ

news.Content: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) is a big name in social media, with top apps such as Facebook, Messenger, Instagram, and WhatsApp all under its umbrella. Billions of people use one of its applications each and every day. With so many eyeballs on its apps, it's little wonder why ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Meta Platforms (META) reported Q4 revenue growth of 24% year-over-year to $59.9 billion, but costs and expenses rose 40%, leading to only 6% operating income growth.

вҖў The company is investing heavily in next-gen technologies like the metaverse and AI, which contribute to significant expenditures.

news.Title: Could Acquiring the Satellite Communications Company Globalstar Send Amazon Stock Soaring?
news.Content: Globalstar 's (NASDAQ: GSAT) stock recently popped amid reports that Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) was in talks to acquire the satellite maker for $8.8 billion. Let's see why Amazon might be interested in Globalstar, and if a takeover would drive its stock higher. Why could Amazon be interested in Globalstar? Amazon is already the world's largest e-commerce and cloud infrastructure company, but it's been quietly building its own low-earth orbit (LEO) satellite business to challenge SpaceX's Starlink and AST SpaceMobile ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Amazon (AMZN) is reportedly considering acquiring Globalstar (GSAT) for $8.8 billion to enhance its low-earth orbit (LEO) satellite business.
вҖў Amazon's Project Kuiper aims to provide cellular connectivity to rural areas and compete with SpaceX's Starlink.
вҖў Globalstar currently operates 48 satellites and plans to expand its constellation to 3,080 satellites.
вҖў The potential acquisition of Globalstar, an unprofitable company with $273 million in 2025 revenue, could be viewed unfavorably by Amazon investors due to its valuation and potential impact on the stock.
news.Keywords: LEO satellite, acquisition, satellite constellation, market competition, profitability, valuation

news.Title: Why StubHub Plunged 35% in March
news.Content: Shares of StubHub (NYSE: STUB) plunged 34.8% in March, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . StubHub delivered its second-ever earnings report after going public last September, but fourth-quarter results underwhelmed expectations. Moreover, management also hinted that 2026 might not see a significant upswing in the company's direct ticketing revenue as some might have expected; ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў StubHub shares plunged 34.8% in March after Q4 results missed expectations, with adjusted losses of ($0.05) per share on $449.2 million revenue.
вҖў Management indicated that material direct ticketing revenue is not expected in 2026.
вҖў Potential regulation of secondary market 'scalping' could impact about 10% of StubHub's gross merchandise volume (GMV).
вҖў Full-year 2025 GMV grew 6%, and adjusted EBITDA is projected to nearly double to $410 million in 2026, suggesting an 8x forward EBITDA valuation.
news.Keywords: ticketing revenue, earnings miss, regulatory scrutiny, gross merchandise volume, EBITDA forecast, valuation

news.Content: Shares of SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ: SOFI) fell 10.6% in March, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . news.AI_Summary:
вҖў SoFi Technologies (SOFI) shares fell 10.6% in March following allegations from a short seller regarding accounting practices.
вҖў Muddy Waters Research claims SoFi uses financial engineering to inflate earnings, citing a higher net charge-off rate (6.1% vs. reported 2.89%).
вҖў Allegations also include booking loans as fee income and using an overly high discount rate for loan fair value.

news.Title: Got $1,000? The Best Pick-and-Shovel Growth Stock for the AI Supercycle Isn't American.
news.Content: Some of the most advanced artificial intelligence (AI) companies , both public and private, are headquartered in the U.S., including Nvidia , OpenAI, Anthropic, Microsoft , and Palantir . And investors can no doubt benefit from owning shares in many of them. But there's one AI stock that's not based in the U.S. that looks like a fantastic place to put $1,000 right now. ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) is highlighted as a prime 'pick-and-shovel' stock for the AI supercycle.
вҖў In 2025, TSMC's sales doubled to $122.4 billion, and earnings rose 46% to $10.65 per ADR, with AI chip manufacturing revenue up 48%.
вҖў TSMC holds a dominant 70% share of the global chip manufacturing market, especially for advanced nodes (7nm and below).
вҖў The company anticipates 30% annualized revenue growth through 2029, with AI-related chip revenue projected to grow over 50% annually.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle, semiconductor manufacturing, market share, revenue growth, advanced technology, pick-and-shovel

news.Title: 4 Retirement Rules That Changed in 2026 That Every Saver Should Know
news.Content: Retiring seems like a straightforward process: save enough money, stop working, and live out the rest of your golden years in financial security. However, recent tax changes, higher contribution limits for retirement accounts, and new rules for required minimum distributions (RMDs) might alter your retirement plans. Let's review the four most significant changes. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Retirement contribution limits have been increased for individuals aged 50-59 and 60-63 for 2025 and 2026.
вҖў High earners ($150,000+) must now use Roth plans for catch-up contributions.
вҖў The SECURE 2.0 Act provides more flexibility for RMDs, including reduced penalties and adjusted starting ages.
вҖў Inherited RMD rules are simplified, allowing surviving spouses to wait until age 73 to begin withdrawals.
news.Keywords: retirement planning, contribution limits, Roth IRA, RMDs, tax law, financial security

news.Title: Why Intel and AMD Stocks Are Rising Today
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Intel ( NASDAQ:INTC ) and Advanced Micro Devices ( NASDAQ:AMD ) shares rose about ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Intel (INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) shares saw a roughly 3% increase after KeyBanc Capital Markets raised their outlooks.

вҖў Intel might have secured design wins for Apple's M-series chips, and Google's use of EMIB-T in TPUs could yield $4-5 billion in revenue.

news.Title: PLTR Rides AI Momentum and Strong Profitability: A Stock Worth Buying?
news.Content: Palantir Technologies PLTR has emerged as one of the most talked-about companies in the artificial intelligence ecosystem. Its powerful data analytics platforms and growing role in defense and commercial AI adoption have attracted significant investor attention. With the stock delivering a strong 91% gain over the past year and the company posting impressive growth metrics, Palantir remains firmly on investorsвҖҷ radar. However, valuation concerns and rising competition from major technology companies seemingly create a balanced investment outlook. Image Source: Zacks Investment Research AI Strategy Positions Palantir for Long-Term Growth PalantirвҖҷs growth story is closely tied to ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Palantir Technologies (PLTR) has seen its stock price increase by 91% over the past year, fueled by its AI strategy and strong growth metrics.
вҖў The company's platforms are utilized in the defense sector, including participation in the DoD's Open DAGIR project.
вҖў Palantir's U.S. commercial customer base is expanding via AIP boot camps and a modular sales approach, contributing to a 24.2% revenue CAGR from 2021-2025.
вҖў Ending 2025 with $7.2 billion in cash and no debt provides Palantir with substantial financial flexibility for ongoing investments.
news.Keywords: AI strategy, defense sector, commercial adoption, revenue growth, financial strength, investment capacity

news.Content: иІЎз¶“дёӯеҝғпјҸе»–зҸӘеҰӮе ұе°Һ е…Ёзҗғз’°еўғйӣңиЁҠеј·пјҢеҸ°иӮЎ3жңҲйңҮзӣӘпјҢзҸҫжӯЈиҷ•ж–јзӣӨжҳҜиҪүжҠҳй»һгҖӮжі•дәәжҢҮеҮәпјҢз•¶еүҚзӣӨеӢўдҪҚж–јеӨҡз©әеҲҶз•ҢпјҢжҠ•иіҮжұәзӯ–иӢҘеҮәзҸҫеҒҸе·®пјҢжҒҗе°Үе°Қдёӯжңҹж“ҚдҪңж–№еҗ‘з”ўз”ҹйЎҜи‘—еҪұйҹҝпјҢжҢҒиӮЎзӯ–з•ҘжҲҗзӮәе·ҰеҸіеҫҢзәҢзёҫж•Ҳзҡ„й—ңйҚөгҖӮжі•дәәеҲҶжһҗпјҢеңЁжӯӨдёҚзўәе®ҡжҖ§з’°еўғдёӢпјҢгҖҢеҚғе…ғй«ҳеғ№йӣ»еӯҗиӮЎгҖҚзӯүз”ұжі•дәәиіҮйҮ‘дё»е°ҺгҖҒж•ЈжҲ¶еҸғиҲҮијғдҪҺзҡ„ж—ҸзҫӨпјҢиў«иҰ–зӮәи§ҖеҜҹзӣӨеӢўеј·ејұзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒжҢҮжЁҷпјҢдәҰжҳҜз©ҚжҘөеһӢжҠ•иіҮдәәеёғеұҖйҮҚй»һгҖӮйҖҸйҒҺй«ҳеғ№иӮЎиө°еӢўпјҢеҸҜйҖІдёҖжӯҘз ”еҲӨеёӮе ҙдҪҚйҡҺиҲҮйҡҺж®өж“ҚдҪңж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ ең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»ж·»и®Ҡж•ёпјҡзҫҺдјҠиЎқзӘҒе»¶е®•пјҢжІ№еғ№иө°еӢўиҰ–жө·еіҪеӢ•ж…ӢиҖҢе®ҡ еңӢйҡӣжғ…еӢўж–№йқўпјҢжі•дәәжҢҮеҮәпјҢзҫҺеңӢзёҪзөұе·қжҷ®иҝ‘жңҹе°ҚдёӯжқұеұҖеӢўзҡ„зҷјиЁҖпјҢдҪҝжІ№еғ№еүҚжҷҜе……ж»ҝи®Ҡж•ёгҖӮе·қжҷ®иЎЁзӨәпјҢзҫҺеңӢеҸҜиғҪеңЁе…©иҮідёүйҖұе…§зөҗжқҹе°ҚдјҠжң—и»ҚдәӢиЎҢеӢ•пјҢдёҰж·ЎеҢ–иҚ·е§ҶиҢІжө·еіҪпјҲStrait of Hormuzпјүе®үе…ЁиІ¬д»»пјҢе°ҺиҮҙеёӮе ҙе°ҚиғҪжәҗдҫӣжҮүз©©е®ҡжҖ§з”ўз”ҹз–‘ж…®гҖӮжі•дәәиӘҚзӮәпјҢжңӘдҫҶжІ№еғ№иө°еӢўй—ңйҚөпјҢе°ҮеҸ–жұәж–јдјҠжң—е°Қи©Іжө·еіҪзҡ„еҫҢзәҢеӢ•дҪңгҖӮ еҗҢжҷӮпјҢзҫҺеңӢж’Өи»ҚеүҚд»ҚеӯҳеңЁиЎқзӘҒеҚҮжә«зҡ„йўЁйҡӘгҖӮжі•дәәжҢҮеҮәпјҢе·қжҷ®ж”ҝеәңе°ҚдјҠжң—ж ёиЁӯж–Ҫжү“ж“ҠжҲҗжһңиӘӘжі•иҲҮеӨ–еӘ’е ұе°ҺеӯҳжңүиҗҪе·®пјҢеёӮе ҙе°Қж”ҝзӯ–еҸҜдҝЎеәҰд»Қеӯҳз–‘пјҢдәҰеўһеҠ зҹӯжңҹең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»дёҚзўәе®ҡжҖ§гҖӮ Touch Taiwan еұ•иҰҪеҠ©ж”»пјҡе…үйӣ»ж—ҸзҫӨеұ•еҮә CPO жҮүз”ЁпјҢжі•дәәеҒҸеӨҡеҜҢйҮҮ еңЁжҠ•иіҮзӯ–з•ҘдёҠпјҢжі•дәәе»әиӯ°дҝқе®ҲеһӢжҠ•иіҮдәәеҸҜй—ңжіЁе…·йЎҢжқҗж”Ҝж’җзҡ„йӣ»еӯҗж—ҸзҫӨгҖӮе…¶дёӯпјҢе…үйӣ»иӮЎж–№йқўпјҢеҸ—Touch Taiwan 2026е°Үж–ј4жңҲ8ж—Ҙй–Ӣеұ•её¶еӢ•пјҢзӣёй—ңжҰӮеҝөиӮЎжңүжңӣзҚІиіҮйҮ‘й—ңжіЁгҖӮеҢ…жӢ¬еҜҢйҮҮпјҲ3714пјүгҖҒеҸӢйҒ”пјҲ2409пјүгҖҒйјҺе…ғпјҲ2426пјүзӯүпјҢе°Үеұ•зӨәе…ұе°ҒиЈқе…үеӯёпјҲCPOпјүзӣёй—ңжҮүз”ЁпјҢжі•дәәеҒҸеӨҡеҜҢйҮҮиЎЁзҸҫпјӣзӣёе°Қд№ӢдёӢпјҢиҸҜжҷ¶з§‘пјҲ3059пјүеӣ зҮҹйҒӢеӢ•иғҪеҒҸејұпјҢе»әиӯ°еҜ©ж…ҺзңӢеҫ…гҖӮ SpaceX йҒһд»¶ IPOпјҡдҪҺи»ҢиЎӣжҳҹиҮЁзҚІеҲ©дәҶзөҗеЈ“пјҢиіҮйҮ‘иҪүйҖІиЈңжјІиӮЎж•¬йө¬ дҪҺи»ҢиЎӣжҳҹйЎҢжқҗж–№йқўпјҢжі•дәәжҢҮеҮәпјҢSpaceXе·Іеҗ‘зҫҺеңӢиӯүеҲёдәӨжҳ“е§”е“ЎжңғпјҲSECпјүйҒһдәӨIPOз”іи«ӢпјҢзҹӯжңҹе…§зӣёй—ңжҰӮеҝөиӮЎеҸҜиғҪйқўиҮЁжјІеӨҡеҫҢзҡ„зҚІеҲ©дәҶзөҗеЈ“еҠӣгҖӮдёҚйҒҺпјҢйҡЁеҫҢзәҢIPOи·Ҝжј”еұ•й–ӢпјҢеёӮе ҙй—ңжіЁеәҰеҸҜжңӣе»¶зәҢгҖӮж“ҚдҪңдёҠпјҢе»әиӯ°е°Қи©•еғ№еҒҸй«ҳзҡ„жҳҮйҒ”з§‘пјҲ3491пјүжҺЎдҝқе®Ҳж…ӢеәҰпјҢеҒҸеӨҡзӣёе°ҚиЈңжјІзҡ„ж•¬йө¬пјҲ2355пјүгҖӮ й„ӯзҝ’жңғиҲҮйҒҝйҡӘйңҖжұӮж’җзӣӨпјҡдёӯжҰӮйЎҢжқҗзҷјй…өпјҢзөұдёҖйӣҶеңҳйҶһйҮҖдҪҺжӘ”и»Ӣз©әиЎҢжғ… жӯӨеӨ–пјҢгҖҢй„ӯзҝ’жңғгҖҚй җжңҹе°Үзҷ»е ҙпјҢжі•дәәиӘҚзӮәе°Үе°ҚдёӯжҰӮиӮЎйЎҢжқҗеҪўжҲҗж”Ҝж’җпјҢеҠ дёҠйҖЈеҒҮжңҹй–“иіҮйҮ‘йҒҝйҡӘйңҖжұӮеҚҮжә«пјҢжңүеҲ©зӣёй—ңж—ҸзҫӨиЎЁзҸҫгҖӮд»ҘзөұдёҖпјҲ1216пјүзӮәи§ҖеҜҹжҢҮжЁҷпјҢе„ҳз®Ўиҝ‘жңҹйҒӯеӨ–иіҮиӘҝйҷҚи©•зӯүпјҢдҪҶжҠҖиЎ“йқўзҹӯжңҹеқҮз·ҡиҪүеј·пјҢдёҚжҺ’йҷӨдҪҺжӘ”йңҮзӣӘеҫҢеҮәзҸҫи»Ӣз©әиЎҢжғ…гҖӮз©ҚжҘөеһӢжҠ•иіҮдәәеҸҜз•ҷж„ҸзөұдёҖйӣҶеңҳж——дёӢзөұдёҖеҜҰпјҲ9907пјүзӯүиӮЎеғ№ж•ҙзҗҶе·Ід№…еҖӢиӮЎгҖӮ

news.Title: The Pullback in Meta Could Be a Gift. Here's Whether to Take It.
news.Content: In the opening months of 2026, shares of Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) have dropped sharply -- erasing roughly 14% of their value year to date and trading about 28% below all-time high prices near $780 in late 2025. Interestingly, Meta's sell-off is not rooted in waning demand for the company's core advertising products. Instead, investors have recoiled ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Meta Platforms (META) shares have declined 14% year-to-date and are trading 28% below their all-time highs, attributed to aggressive capital expenditure (capex) plans and regulatory issues.
вҖў Meta reported $201 billion in revenue for fiscal year 2025, a 22% increase year-over-year, with stable 41% operating margins and $44 billion in free cash flow.
вҖў The company's $135 billion AI investment for 2026 is viewed as directly benefiting its ad business, contrasting with the metaverse investment.
вҖў With a forward P/E near 19, Meta's stock is trading at its lowest valuation since last summer, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
news.Keywords: capex, regulatory risk, revenue growth, operating margin, AI spending, stock valuation

news.Title: What's Behind Credo's Strong Margins and Profitability Gains?
news.Content: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd CRDO reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2026 margins and profitability gains driven by several factors. The company attributes its performance to the continued build-out of large-scale AI clusters, where increasing system complexity has made reliability, power efficiency, latency and total cost of ownership critical. Its purpose-built SerDes technology, vertically integrated system-level model and advanced telemetry capabilities have enabled deep strategic partnerships and differentiated solutions. Strong demand for ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Credo Technology Group (CRDO) delivered record Q3 fiscal 2026 performance with revenue of $407 million (up 52% sequentially, tripling YoY).
вҖў Non-GAAP gross margin reached 68.6%, and operating margin expanded to 49.6%, with non-GAAP net income at $208.8 million.
вҖў Growth is attributed to strong demand for AI clusters, active electrical cables (AECs), and increasing customer diversification.
вҖў Management projects mid-single-digit sequential growth in fiscal 2027, translating to over 50% year-over-year growth.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, revenue growth, gross margin, operating margin, AECs, future projections

news.Title: Can Meta Stock Hit $3,727 per Share?
news.Content: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) currently trades for about $535 per share. However, there's a goal for it to reach $3,727 per share by 2031. That's a long way away from today's price, but why is this the target? The social media giant is offering a massive ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Meta Platforms (META) aims for a $9 trillion market capitalization by 2031, which would translate to a $3,727 stock price.
вҖў Achieving this goal likely requires success in developing new capabilities beyond social media, such as AI glasses.
вҖў If Meta sells 250 million AI glasses with a $50 monthly subscription, it could generate $150 billion in annual revenue.
вҖў This new revenue stream, while significant, may not be sufficient on its own to justify a $9 trillion market cap.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, AI glasses, subscription revenue, new products, valuation target, business model

news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) just had a standout month in South Korea, ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Content: For Immediate Release Chicago, IL – April 6, 2026 – Zacks.com announces the list of stocks featured in the Analyst Blog. V, The Home Depot, Inc. HD and BayFirst Financial Corp. BAFN. Here are highlights from Thursday’s Analyst Blog: Top Stock Reports for Broadcom, Visa and Home Depot The Zacks Research Daily presents the best research output of our analyst team. Today's Research Daily features new research reports on ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) shares have outperformed the Electronics - Semiconductors industry over the past year (+100% vs. +98.4%).
вҖў Strong momentum is driven by AI semiconductors and VMware integration, with notable demand for networking products and custom AI accelerators (XPUs).

news.Keywords: AI semiconductors, VMware integration, networking products, custom accelerators, revenue growth, valuation

news.Title: IsВ VNET Group, Inc. (VNET)В A Good StockВ ToВ Buy Now?
news.Content: Is VNET a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on VNET Group, Inc. on Valueinvestorsclub.com by cable888. In this article, we will summarize the bullsвҖҷ thesis on VNET. VNET Group, Inc.'s share was trading at $8.45 as of March 27th. VNETвҖҷs forward P/E was 23.58 according to Yahoo Finance. VNET is ChinaвҖҷs leading carrier-neutral data center operator, strategically ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў VNET Group, Inc. is China's leading carrier-neutral data center operator, transitioning to wholesale IDC operations to capitalize on AI adoption.
вҖў VNET holds an 11% market share in China's IDC market and has exclusive partnerships with Microsoft Azure and Microsoft 365.
вҖў The company targets 400MW of new wholesale IDC deliveries in 2026 with 90% customer commitments, achieving utilization rates above 80%.
вҖў VNET trades at a discount to peers like GDS, with wholesale IDC revenue projected to grow 57% in 2026 and EBITDA margins forecast to expand to 35.5%.
news.Keywords: data center, wholesale IDC, AI adoption, market share, strategic partnerships, revenue growth

news.Title: Is Broadcom (AVGO) The Best AI Chip Stock to Buy Today?
news.Content: We just covered the 10 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Ken Griffin . Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) ranks #6 (see the 5 Best Stocks to Buy According ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Broadcom (AVGO) is well-positioned to benefit from the shift to custom AI chips, holding over 70% market share in this segment.
вҖў The company's Tomahawk 5 and Jericho chips are becoming industry standards for connecting AI GPUs, creating a new revenue stream.
вҖў Broadcom is aggressively transitioning VMware customers to a subscription model, expected to drive double-digit software revenue growth.
вҖў The stock trades at a forward P/E of 28, with analysts projecting 41% annualized earnings growth, making it a strong AI play.
news.Keywords: custom AI chips, market share, networking chips, VMware, subscription model, revenue growth

news.Title: Stocks Rise, Oil Falls as Traders Gauge Truce Odds: Markets Wrap
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Tech giants lifted stocks in a cautious advance as oil climbed, with investors parsing conflicting headlines about a push toward a ceasefire in the Iran war. The S&P 500 rose for a fourth straight session in its longest winning streak since January. Micron Technology Inc. led gains in chipmakers. US ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Tech stocks advanced cautiously amid conflicting headlines about a potential ceasefire in the Iran war, with the S&P 500 rising for the fourth straight session.
вҖў Micron Technology Inc. led gains among chipmakers; US crude oil prices remained near $112.
вҖў Oracle named Hilary Maxson as CFO; OpenAI released policy recommendations for AI's societal impact.
вҖў Strategy Inc., a Bitcoin accumulator, reported a $14.5 billion unrealized loss in Q1 due to falling cryptocurrency values.
news.Keywords: tech stocks, market performance, geopolitical risk, chipmakers, corporate finance, cryptocurrency

news.Title: The Big Reason Behind Micron's Impressive Growth? Prices Have Been Soaring, and That Isn't Sustainable
news.Content: In the past 12 months, shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) have more than quadrupled in value. The company has experienced significant demand for its memory and storage products. Meanwhile, investors and analysts continue to see much more growth ahead due to the build-out in artificial intelligence as hyperscalers remain aggressive ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Micron Technology (MU) shares have more than quadrupled in value over the past 12 months, driven by strong demand for memory and storage products.
вҖў The company's revenue in its most recent quarter totaled $23.9 billion, roughly triple the $8.1 billion posted a year ago.
вҖў Net income reached $13.8 billion, nearly nine times the prior year's $1.6 billion, largely due to sharp price increases for DRAM and NAND products.
вҖў A risk exists if prices do not continue to rise rapidly or if supply catches up to demand, potentially leading to slowed or negative growth.
news.Keywords: memory chips, storage products, revenue growth, net income, average selling price, market shortage

news.Title: Consumer hardware trade in danger as Iran war triggers memory chip pricing explosion
news.Content: Hardware makers may soon show the impact of the Iran war despite their recent stock outperformance. The S&P 500 Technology Hardware Index ( ^SP500-4520 ) has outperformed the S&P 500 ( ^GSPC ) by 13% since February. Yet Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring warns that the industry will face multiple headwinds in the near future. More from Yahoo Scout What alternative investments do analysts recommend instead? What memory chip price increases are companies ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Hardware makers may face headwinds from the Iran war impacting memory chip prices and demand, despite recent stock outperformance.
вҖў Morgan Stanley warns of persistent memory tightness and emerging signs of demand weakness, advising a 'Cautionary' stance.
вҖў Soaring energy prices and shipping bottlenecks due to the Iran war are increasing manufacturing costs for memory chips.
вҖў Companies like HP, Logitech, and GoPro may struggle to pass on increased costs, potentially leading to a 5-10% drop in earnings.
news.Keywords: memory chips, hardware manufacturers, geopolitical impact, energy prices, shipping costs, earnings pressure

news.Title: Goldman Sachs' blunt warning to laid-off tech workers: It will take time and earnings loss to find a new job
news.Content: Goldman Sachs is out with a blunt take for tech workers being displaced by AI: Expect a lengthy search to secure a job that will probably pay less than your previous gig. "Workers displaced from technology-disrupted occupations face more difficult short-run transitions back into employment," Goldman Sachs strategist Pierfrancesco Mei wrote in a new note on Monday. "They take approximately one month longer to find a new job ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Goldman Sachs notes that tech workers displaced by AI face longer job searches and potential real earnings losses of over 3%.
вҖў Occupational downgrading is a key factor, with displaced workers moving into more routine roles.
вҖў Massive layoffs have occurred at companies like Block (40% workforce reduction), Amazon, Oracle, and Meta due to AI adoption.
вҖў The tech industry saw 18,720 job cuts in March, a 40% year-over-year increase, with AI investment cited as a driver.
news.Keywords: AI displacement, job search, earnings loss, occupational downgrading, tech layoffs, workforce trends

news.Title: Tesla just pulled off an EV shocker no one saw coming
news.Content: Tesla ( TSLA ) is back in business after a brutal few quarters. It's at the top of the global battery-electric vehicle market, and the timing could not be more important. The EV maker said it delivered 358,023 vehicles in the first quarter, ample growth to move past BYD вҖҷs 310,389 battery-electric sales and reclaim the global BEV crown. That's great news for Tesla and signals that demand for its cars remains high amid a troubling geopolitical atmosphere. That's the good news for Tesla. The ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Tesla delivered 358,023 vehicles in Q1, reclaiming the global battery-electric vehicle (BEV) crown from BYD.
вҖў However, Q1 deliveries missed analyst expectations and represented Tesla's worst delivery quarter in a year, with over 50,000 vehicles left unsold.
вҖў This miss is attributed to uneven demand, particularly in the U.S. following the expiration of EV tax credits, and increased global competition.
вҖў BYD's sales fell 30% year-over-year in Q1, partly due to China's new EV purchase tax and efforts to curb price wars.
news.Keywords: EV deliveries, market share, analyst expectations, inventory levels, EV competition, China market

news.Title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Just Said 5 Words That Confirmed Wall Street's Deepest Fears
news.Content: As billionaire Warren Buffett has aged, his public appearances have understandably become less common. Now that Buffett is no longer CEO of Berkshire Hathaway , I'd expect public appearances for the 95-year-old to become even more rare. Recently, however, Buffett gave an interview to CNBC and offered several interesting insights into Berkshire's holdings. Investors always scrutinize what the Oracle of Omaha has to say, given his ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Warren Buffett indicated that Berkshire Hathaway views the current market as overvalued, stating 'but not in this market' regarding potential Apple stock purchases.
вҖў Berkshire Hathaway holds Apple as its largest holding, accounting for 23% of its stock portfolio at the end of 2025.
вҖў The market's high valuation is also suggested by the S&P 500's Shiller CAPE ratio being well above its 10-year average.
вҖў The Buffett indicator (Wilshire 5,000 to GDP) has also been at all-time highs, suggesting potential overvaluation.
news.Keywords: market valuation, investor sentiment, Berkshire Hathaway, Apple holding, Shiller CAPE ratio, Buffett indicator

news.Title: The Last Time the Stock Market Was This Expensive, It Dropped Nearly 50%.
news.Content: The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) recorded a cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio of 39.2 in February. If that number doesn't mean much to you, here's the headline: The S&P 500 has only posted a CAPE ratio this high in the lead-up to the dot-com crash of 2000. The S&P 500 lost 49% of its value over the next two-and-a-half years. What is the CAPE? The CAPE ratio is a measure of how expensive the ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў The S&P 500's cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio reached 39.2 in February, a level last seen before the dot-com crash.
вҖў Historically, CAPE ratios above 30 have implied lower forward annual returns for the S&P 500, dropping to about 2% at current levels.
вҖў While AI revenue growth is a factor, the article suggests consumer and enterprise adoption of AI is not yet substantial enough to justify current spending.
вҖў The Iran war and surging oil prices add recessionary risks, potentially leading to significant market declines if a recession materializes.
news.Keywords: CAPE ratio, market valuation, forward returns, AI adoption, recession risk, oil prices

news.Content:
иІЎз¶“дёӯеҝғпјҸе»–зҸӘеҰӮе ұе°Һ

йҖұеӣӣеҸ°иӮЎз”ұзҙ…зҝ»й»‘пјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң602.39й»һпјҢи·Ңе№…-1.82%пјҢж”¶еңЁ32572.43й»һпјҢеҶҚеәҰи·Ңз ҙ33000й»һеӨ§й—ңпјӣдёҠйҖұеҸ°иӮЎйҖұз·ҡзәҢи·Ң540.16й»һпјҢйҖұз·ҡйҖЈ2й»‘пјҢи·Ңе№…-1.63%пјҢе№іеқҮж—ҘеқҮйҮҸ7270.11е„„е…ғгҖӮйӣ–з„¶дёҠйҖұдәӨжҳ“ж—Ҙеғ…4еӨ©пјҢдҪҶеӨ–иіҮиіЈи¶…йҮ‘йЎҚзӣёијғеүҚйҖұж“ҙеӨ§пјҢйҖЈзәҢз¬¬5йҖұиіЈи¶…1601.26е„„е…ғпјҢиҮӘзҮҹе•Ҷд№ҹйҖЈ6йҖұз«ҷеңЁиіЈж–№пјҢе–®йҖұиіЈи¶…197.84е„„е…ғпјҢжң¬йҖұеҶҚеәҰеғ…жҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәз«ҷеңЁиІ·ж–№пјҢйҖЈзәҢ8йҖұиІ·и¶…248.75е„„е…ғпјҢдёүеӨ§жі•дәәеҗҲиЁҲиіЈи¶…1550.36е„„е…ғгҖӮ

ең°з·ЈиЎқзӘҒиЎқж“Ҡеұ¬зҹӯжңҹпјҡзҫҺдјҠжҲ°дәӢжңӘжӯҮйҮҖйңҮзӣӘпјҢеӣһжё¬еӯЈз·ҡжө®зҸҫеҲҶжү№еёғеұҖиүҜж©ҹ

PGIMдҝқеҫ·дҝЎйҮ‘ж»ҝж„ҸеҹәйҮ‘з¶“зҗҶдәәйғӯжҳҺзҺүжҢҮеҮәпјҢе…ЁзҗғйҮ‘иһҚеёӮе ҙе…ЁзҡҶиҰ–зҫҺдјҠжҲ°зҲӯдҪ•жҷӮеҒңзҒ«д»ҘеҸҠжІ№еғ№иө°еӢўиҖҢжіўеӢ•пјҢеҸ°иӮЎд№ҹеңЁеңӢйҡӣеёӮе ҙиЎқж“ҠдёӢеҮәзҸҫеӨ§е№…йңҮзӣӘпјҢй җжңҹеңЁзҫҺдјҠйӣҷж–№жңӘжӯЈејҸж’Өе…өеүҚпјҢд»Қй ҲжҢҒзәҢжҸҗйҳІиЎҢжғ…жіўеӢ•пјҢдёҚйҒҺеҫһжӯ·еҸІз¶“й©—дҫҶзңӢпјҢең°з·ЈиЎқзӘҒе°ҚиӮЎеёӮиЎқж“ҠеӨҡдёҚиҮҙжј”и®ҠжҲҗй•·жңҹеҪұйҹҝпјҢеҸ°иӮЎзӣ®еүҚеӣһжё¬еӯЈз·ҡдҪҚзҪ®пјҢеҸҚиҖҢеҸҜиҰ–зӮәиүҜеҘҪзҡ„еҲҶжү№йҖІе ҙеёғеұҖжҷӮй»һгҖӮ

йҖҡиҶЁйўЁйҡӘи©•дј°еҸҜжҺ§пјҡиӢҘжІ№еғ№ж–јз¬¬еӣӣеӯЈеӣһиҗҪпјҢе°Қе…Ёзҗғз¶“жҝҹиҲҮдҫӣжҮүйҸҲеҪұйҹҝжңүйҷҗ

йғӯжҳҺзҺүиЎЁзӨәпјҢеҸӘиҰҒд»Ҡе№ҙз¬¬еӣӣеӯЈжІ№еғ№еӣһиҗҪеҲ°75зҫҺе…ғд№ӢдёӢпјҢиҖҢйқһз¶ӯжҢҒеңЁ110зҫҺе…ғзҡ„жҘөз«Ҝй«ҳеғ№пјҢйҖҷжіўжІ№еғ№дёҠжјІе°ҮдҪҝжңӘдҫҶ12еҖӢжңҲе…Ёзҗғж•ҙй«”йҖҡиҶЁзҺҮдёҠеҚҮ0.8%пјҢеҪұйҹҝGDPзҙ„0.4%гҖӮз”ұж–јжӯӨж¬ЎжҲ°зҲӯиҲҮ2021е№ҙиҮі2022е№ҙдҫӣжҮүйҸҲзҹӯзјәеҸҠдҝ„зғҸжҲ°зҲӯзҡ„йҖҡиҶЁз’°еўғжңүжүҖдёҚеҗҢпјҢе…ЁзҗғдҫӣжҮүйҸҲдёҰжңӘе»ЈжіӣеҸ—иЎқж“ҠпјҢеӢһеӢ•еёӮе ҙдәҰйҒ йқһз–«жғ…и§Је°ҒеҲқжңҹз·ҠејөпјҢи©•дј°жІ№еғ№иӢҘиғҪйҖҗжӯҘеӣһиҗҪпјҢе°Қж ёеҝғйҖҡиҶЁд№ӢеӮіе°Һж•ҲжҮүжҲ–жңүе…¶йҷҗеәҰгҖӮ

жҷ¶ең“д»Је·Ҙ 2.0 й»һзҮғйӣҷеӢ•иғҪпјҡAI з®—еҠӣйңҖжұӮзҲҶзҷјпјҢе…ҲйҖІе°ҒиЈқз”ўиғҪжҳҺе№ҙдј°йЈҶеўһе…«жҲҗ

дё”еҫһеҸ°иӮЎе…·жңүиүҜеҘҪеҹәжң¬йқўи§’еәҰдҫҶзңӢпјҢйғӯжҳҺзҺүеҲҶжһҗпјҢеңЁжҷ¶ең“д»Је·ҘйҫҚй ӯеё¶еӢ•дёӢпјҢеҸ°иӮЎж•ҙй«”дјҒжҘӯзҚІеҲ©е№ҙеўһзҺҮй җдј°дёҠзңӢ32%пјҢдё”зҸҫеңЁAIи¶ЁеӢўж“ҙеұ•иҮіз”ҹжҲҗејҸAIиҲҮд»ЈзҗҶејҸAIжҮүз”ЁйӣҷеӢ•иғҪжҺЁеӢ•дёӢпјҢжҺЁзҗҶз«Ҝз®—еҠӣйңҖжұӮеҝ«йҖҹж“ҙејөпјҢAIз”ўжҘӯзҷјеұ•йҮҚеҝғе·Із”ұе–®дёҖжҷ¶ең“иЈҪйҖ пјҢиҪүеҗ‘дҫӣжҮүйҸҲе…Ёйқўз«¶зҲӯпјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜж¶өи“ӢгҖҢиЈҪйҖ пјӢе°ҒиЈқпјӢзі»зөұж•ҙеҗҲгҖҚзҡ„жҷ¶ең“д»Је·Ҙ2.0(Foundry 2.0)гҖӮж“ҡзөұиЁҲ2025е№ҙе…ЁзҗғFoundry 2.0еёӮе ҙзҮҹж”¶йҒ”3200е„„зҫҺе…ғпјҢе№ҙеўһе№…16пј…пјҢй җдј°йҖІе…Ҙ2026е№ҙпјҢе…Ёзҗғе…ҲйҖІе°ҒиЈқз”ўиғҪе№ҙеўһе№…е°Үй«ҳйҒ”80пј…д№ӢеӨҡгҖӮ

news.Title: The Top Three Nuclear Energy Stocks to Buy Right Now
news.Content: Nuclear energy is in the midst of a global renaissance. According to the World Nuclear Association, there are 75 nuclear reactors under construction with another 120 planned. The U.S Department of Energy has set a goal to triple America's nuclear power production by the middle of the century. Nuclear power sits at the crossroads of a number of trends, like the power needs of artificial intelligence (AI), the larger push for green energy, and instability in global energy markets caused by a renewed wave ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Nuclear energy is experiencing a global renaissance, with significant growth in new reactors and U.S. government support.
вҖў Cameco (CCJ), the world's second-largest uranium miner, is highlighted for its high-grade mines and involvement in nuclear fuel refining and plant engineering.
вҖў Constellation Energy (CEG), the largest U.S. nuclear power provider, is expanding capacity to meet AI data center power needs and has partnered with Microsoft.

news.Title: MicronВ Worries Pile Up Ahead of RivalвҖҷs $10 Billion US Listing
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Micron Technology Inc. is having a tough few weeks in the stock market, and the upcoming US listing of South Korean rival SK Hynix Inc. will only add to its challenges. Shares of Micron, the third largest maker of memory chips in the world, blasted out of the gate to start the year, soaring almost 50% in January for the second best performance in the S&P 500 Index. But lately theyвҖҷve been weighed down by concerns about the memory sector and uncertainty in the ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Micron Technology (MU) shares have declined over 20% from recent highs, pressured by memory sector concerns and market uncertainty due to the Iran conflict.
вҖў The upcoming US listing of rival SK Hynix Inc., a key Nvidia supplier, could raise up to $10 billion and impact Micron's market position.
вҖў SK Hynix leads in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) with 57% global revenue share, more than double Micron's.
вҖў While Micron shares trade at a slight premium to SK Hynix, both are inexpensive relative to the S&P 500, and the US listing may narrow valuation gaps.
news.Keywords: memory sector, stock performance, HBM, competitive landscape, valuation, geopolitical uncertainty

news.Title: How Ford Is Becoming an AI Stock After the Wheels Fell Off Its EV Strategy
news.Content: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) made a huge bet on electric vehicles (EVs), but ultimately had to make changes following years of steep financial losses. In December 2025, Ford announced it was canceling several planned electric vehicle models and taking a $19.5 billion write-down. ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Ford Motor Company (F) is shifting its EV strategy, canceling some planned models and taking a $19.5 billion write-down, but still developing EVs and hybrids.
вҖў The company plans to repurpose an EV plant to manufacture battery energy storage systems (BESS) for data centers, aiming for 20 GW annual production by late 2027.
вҖў The BESS industry is projected to grow at a 15.8% annual rate, reaching $106 billion by 2030.
вҖў This energy storage business represents an outside-the-box growth catalyst for Ford, potentially improving its Model e segment profitability by 2029.
news.Keywords: EV strategy, battery storage, data centers, energy infrastructure, growth catalyst, market growth

news.Title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Apple, Nvidia and Microsoft
news.Content: For Immediate Release Chicago, IL – April 6, 2026 – Today, Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Apple AAPL, Nvidia NVDA and Microsoft MSFT. Apple, NVIDIA and Microsoft: Buy the Dip in Big Tech? 2026 has proven more challenging for equities than many anticipated, with former market leaders like the Magnificent Seven delivering a rare period of underperformance. More broadly, the group has traded sideways to lower over the past six months, weighed down by concerns around elevated valuations, aggressive AI-related capital spending, and, more recently, geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Yet beneath the surface, the fundamental picture has remained ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Microsoft (MSFT) shares have declined over 23% year-to-date, trading at a notable discount to its historical valuation (22.5x forward earnings vs. 29.4x 10-year median).
вҖў Despite this valuation compression, earnings are projected to grow at an annual rate of approximately 16%.
вҖў Microsoft's strong position in cloud computing continues to drive resilient and reaccelerating growth.
вҖў Nvidia (NVDA) is noted for its compelling growth-to-valuation ratio, trading at a discount to its median multiple despite strong earnings growth.
news.Keywords: stock performance, valuation, cloud computing, earnings growth, AI, market discount

news.Title: Heavy AI Spending Weighs on Alibaba's Profits: Hold or Fold the Stock?
news.Content: Alibaba Group BABA has staked its future on artificial intelligence (AI), channeling billions into cloud infrastructure, proprietary chip development and the relentless rollout of frontier large language models. Yet the deeper the company wades into this spending cycle, the worse its financials appear. What was once a reliably profitable e-commerce giant now resembles a company sacrificing present earnings for a future that may take years to materialize. As profitability crumbles and free cash flow dries up under the weight of unprecedented capital expenditure, BABA is beginning to look like a stock investors would ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Alibaba Group (BABA) reported a sharp decline in profits for fiscal Q3 2026, with operating profit down 74% year-over-year to RMB 10.6 billion.
вҖў Non-GAAP net profit decreased by 67% to RMB 16.7 billion, and free cash flow fell 71% to RMB 1.1 billion.
вҖў The company's financial performance is heavily impacted by significant capital expenditures on cloud infrastructure and AI, amounting to roughly RMB 120 billion in the last four quarters.
вҖў Management's outlook suggests ongoing capital expenditure pressures, pushing back the timeline for achieving overall profitability.
news.Keywords: profit decline, capital expenditure, AI investment, cloud infrastructure, cash flow, financial guidance

news.Title: Analysis-Investors press Amazon, Microsoft and Google on water, power use in US data centers
news.Content: By Simon Jessop, Valerie Volcovici and Supantha Mukherjee LONDON, April 6 (Reuters) - Amazon, Microsoft and Alphabet's Google have each recently abandoned construction of multibillion-dollar data centers over community opposition and now the companies are coming under shareholder pressure over the environmental impact of their projects. More from Yahoo Scout What climate commitments are tech companies struggling with? Why do investors want site-specific environmental data? How much ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Shareholders are increasing pressure on Amazon, Microsoft, and Google for more transparency regarding water usage and conservation efforts in their U.S. data centers.
вҖў North American data centers collectively used nearly 1 trillion liters of water in 2025, roughly equivalent to New York City's annual water demand.
вҖў While closed-loop cooling is employed, reported water usage data varies, with Meta and Google showing increases in total consumption.
вҖў Investors emphasize the need for site-specific data to better assess operational risks and the companies' management of environmental impacts.
news.Keywords: data center sustainability, water usage, shareholder pressure, environmental data, operational risk, energy consumption

news.Title: 7е·Ёй ӯжҷӮд»ЈзөӮзөҗпјҹ еӨ–еӘ’жӣқ3жҺҘжЈ’иҖ… 2еӨ§ж–°йңёдё»з·ҠиҝҪеҸ°з©Қйӣ»
news.Content:
йҒҺеҺ»е№ҫе№ҙпјҢзҫҺиӮЎгҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚе№ҫд№Һдё»е°ҺдәҶжЁҷжҷ®500жҢҮж•ёзҡ„жјІеӢўгҖӮдёҚйҒҺпјҢйҡЁи‘—еёӮе ҙй–Ӣе§ӢиіӘз–‘дәәе·Ҙжҷәж…§пјҲAIпјүиғҪеҗҰеҝ«йҖҹиҪүеҢ–зӮәеҜҰйҡӣзҚІеҲ©пјҢеҠ дёҠз¶“жҝҹиҲҮең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»йўЁйҡӘеҚҮй«ҳпјҢиҳӢжһңгҖҒијқйҒ”гҖҒзү№ж–ҜжӢүзӯүйҫҚй ӯиӮЎиҝ‘е№ҫе‘ЁиЎЁзҸҫжҳҺйЎҜиҪүејұпјҢд№ҹи®“жҠ•иіҮеёӮе ҙй–Ӣе§ӢеҮәзҸҫеҗҢдёҖеҖӢе•ҸйЎҢпјҡз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯзҡ„жҷӮд»ЈпјҢжҳҜеҗҰжӯЈеңЁиө°еҗ‘е°ҫиҒІпјҹ

еёӮе ҙжңҖеҸ—й—ңжіЁзҡ„зҫҺиӮЎгҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬иҳӢжһңгҖҒAlphabetгҖҒдәһйҰ¬йҒңгҖҒMetaгҖҒеҫ®и»ҹгҖҒијқйҒ”иҲҮзү№ж–ҜжӢүгҖӮйҖҷдәӣе…¬еҸёжӣҫеӣ AIйЎҢжқҗиҲҮз§‘жҠҖжҲҗй•·иҖҢжҢҒзәҢжҺЁеҚҮиӮЎеғ№пјҢдҪҶеҰӮд»ҠеёӮе ҙе°ҚAIеҜҰйҡӣж”¶зӣҠзҡ„жңҹеҫ…й–Ӣе§ӢйҷҚжә«пјҢдёғе·Ёй ӯиӮЎеғ№д№ҹдёҚеҶҚеғҸйҒҺеҺ»дёҖжЁЈдёҖи·ҜдёҠжјІгҖӮ

еңЁйҖҷжЁЈзҡ„иғҢжҷҜдёӢпјҢзҫҺеңӢжҠ•иіҮеӘ’й«”гҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢй»һеҗҚ3е®¶е…¬еҸёпјҢжңүж©ҹжңғжҲҗзӮәдёӢдёҖжіўз§‘жҠҖиӮЎдё»и§’пјҢеҲҶеҲҘжҳҜеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖҒеҚҡйҖҡиҲҮNebius GroupгҖӮ

еҸ°з©Қйӣ»жҺҢжҸЎAIе‘Ҫи„Ҳ

и«ҮеҲ°AIжҷ¶зүҮпјҢеӨҡж•ёжҠ•иіҮдәәйҰ–е…ҲжғіеҲ°зҡ„д»ҚжҳҜијқйҒ”гҖӮдёҚйҒҺпјҢзңҹжӯЈиІ иІ¬з”ҹз”ўијқйҒ”жҷ¶зүҮпјҢд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–еӨҡе®¶з§‘жҠҖеӨ§е» жҷ¶зүҮзҡ„пјҢе…¶еҜҰжҳҜеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖӮ

з”ұж–јеҸ°з©Қйӣ»дҪҚж–јAIз”ўжҘӯйҸҲжңҖж ёеҝғзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®пјҢеӣ жӯӨеҚідҪҝеёӮе ҙдёҠзҡ„AIжҮүз”ЁжҢҒзәҢж“ҙејөпјҢжңҖзөӮд»ҚжңүеҫҲеӨ§дёҖйғЁеҲҶйңҖжұӮжңғеӣһеҲ°жҷ¶зүҮиЈҪйҖ з«ҜгҖӮйҖҷд№ҹи®“еҸ°з©Қйӣ»жҲҗзӮәAIзҶұжҪ®дёӢзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒеҸ—жғ иҖ…гҖӮ

жӣҙйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„жҳҜпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҡ„жҲҗй•·дёҰдёҚеҸӘдҫҶиҮӘAIгҖӮйҷӨдәҶAIжҷ¶зүҮд№ӢеӨ–пјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»д№ҹжҢҒзәҢз”ҹз”ўжҷәж…§еһӢжүӢж©ҹгҖҒеҖӢдәәйӣ»и…Ұзӯүз”ўе“ҒжүҖйңҖжҷ¶зүҮпјҢжҘӯеӢҷзҜ„еңҚж©«и·ЁеӨҡеҖӢзөӮз«ҜеёӮе ҙгҖӮзӣёијғж–јдҫқиіҙе–®дёҖз”ўе“ҒжҲ–е–®дёҖе®ўжҲ¶зҡ„дјҒжҘӯпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҡ„еёғеұҖжӣҙеҠ еҲҶж•ЈпјҢд№ҹи®“е…¶жңӘдҫҶжҲҗй•·е…·еӮҷжӣҙй«ҳз©©е®ҡжҖ§гҖӮ

гҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢеӣ жӯӨиӘҚзӮәпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»ж—ўжҺҢжҸЎAIи¶ЁеӢўпјҢеҸҲдёҚе®Ңе…ЁеҸ—еҲ¶ж–јAIжҷҜж°ЈеҫӘз’°пјҢжҳҜжңҖжңүж©ҹжңғеңЁдёғе·Ёй ӯд№ӢеҫҢжҢҒзәҢж“ҙеӨ§еҪұйҹҝеҠӣзҡ„е…¬еҸёд№ӢдёҖгҖӮ

еҚҡйҖҡйҒҝй–ӢиҲҮијқйҒ”жӯЈйқўз«¶зҲӯ

еҸҰдёҖе®¶иў«й»һеҗҚзҡ„пјҢжҳҜз¶Іи·ҜиҲҮжҷ¶зүҮеӨ§е» еҚҡйҖҡгҖӮиҲҮијқйҒ”дё»жү“йҖҡз”ЁеһӢAIжҷ¶зүҮдёҚеҗҢпјҢеҚҡйҖҡйҒёж“ҮеҲҮе…Ҙе®ўиЈҪеҢ–жҷ¶зүҮеёӮе ҙгҖӮжҸӣеҸҘи©ұиӘӘпјҢеҚҡйҖҡдёҰйқһиҲҮијқйҒ”зӣҙжҺҘз«¶зҲӯпјҢиҖҢжҳҜйҮқе°ҚдёҚеҗҢе®ўжҲ¶гҖҒдёҚеҗҢз”ЁйҖ”пјҢжҸҗдҫӣе°Ҳй–ҖиЁӯиЁҲзҡ„жҷ¶зүҮж–№жЎҲгҖӮ

йҖҷжЁЈзҡ„зӯ–з•ҘпјҢд№ҹи®“еҚҡйҖҡеңЁAIжөӘжҪ®дёӯжүҫеҲ°еұ¬ж–јиҮӘе·ұзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®гҖӮз•¶и¶ҠдҫҶи¶ҠеӨҡдјҒжҘӯеёҢжңӣжү“йҖ з¬ҰеҗҲиҮӘиә«йңҖжұӮзҡ„AIзі»зөұжҷӮпјҢе®ўиЈҪеҢ–жҷ¶зүҮзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒжҖ§д№ҹйҡЁд№ӢжҸҗй«ҳпјҢеҚҡйҖҡеӣ жӯӨеҸ—жғ гҖӮ

еҚҡйҖҡеңЁжңҖж–°дёҖеӯЈиІЎе ұдёӯй җдј°пјҢеҲ°2027е№ҙпјҢAIжҷ¶зүҮзҮҹж”¶е°Үи¶…йҒҺ1000е„„зҫҺе…ғгҖӮе…¬еҸёеҗҢжҷӮиЎЁзӨәпјҢзӣ®еүҚе®ўжҲ¶йңҖжұӮд»Қз„¶еј·еӢҒпјҢеӣ жӯӨйҖҷй …зӣ®жЁҷдёҰйқһйҒҷдёҚеҸҜеҸҠгҖӮ

зӣёијғж–јеёӮе ҙе°Қдёғе·Ёй ӯжҲҗй•·ж”ҫз·©зҡ„з–‘ж…®пјҢеҚҡйҖҡеҸҚиҖҢеӣ зӮәеҲҮе…ҘдёҚеҗҢеёӮе ҙгҖҒйҒҝй–ӢиҲҮијқйҒ”зЎ¬зў°зЎ¬пјҢиҖҢиў«иҰ–зӮәжӣҙжңүж©ҹжңғжҢҒзәҢеҸ—жғ ж–јAIйңҖжұӮзҡ„дјҒжҘӯгҖӮ

Nebiusе°Ҳж”»AIйӣІз«Ҝ

йҷӨдәҶеӨ§еһӢжҷ¶зүҮе…¬еҸёд№ӢеӨ–пјҢгҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢд№ҹзү№еҲҘй»һеҗҚијғе°‘дәәзҶҹжӮүзҡ„Nebius GroupгҖӮNebiusеұ¬ж–јгҖҢж–°еһӢйӣІз«ҜгҖҚпјҲneocloudпјүй ҳеҹҹзҡ„й ҳе…ҲдјҒжҘӯпјҢдё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣAIжҷ¶зүҮиҲҮзӣёй—ңжңҚеӢҷпјҢи®“е®ўжҲ¶еҸҜд»ҘдҫқйңҖжұӮз§ҹз”ЁгҖӮиҲҮдәһйҰ¬йҒңгҖҒеҫ®и»ҹзӯүеӨ§еһӢйӣІз«ҜжңҚеӢҷе•ҶдёҚеҗҢпјҢNebiusдёҰдёҚжҸҗдҫӣе»Јжіӣзҡ„йӣІз«ҜжңҚеӢҷпјҢиҖҢжҳҜе°ҮйҮҚеҝғж”ҫеңЁAIйҒӢз®—е·ҘдҪңиІ ијүгҖӮ

жӯЈеӣ зӮәйҖҷзЁ®е°ҲжіЁзӯ–з•ҘпјҢNebiusеҫ—д»ҘеңЁеёӮе ҙдёӯеҝ«йҖҹе»әз«Ӣе®ҡдҪҚгҖӮз•¶ж„ҲдҫҶж„ҲеӨҡдјҒжҘӯйңҖиҰҒAIз®—еҠӣпјҢдҪҶеҸҲдёҚжғіиҮӘиЎҢиіјиІ·еӨ§йҮҸиЁӯеӮҷжҷӮпјҢNebiusжҸҗдҫӣзҡ„з§ҹз”ЁжЁЎејҸпјҢдҫҝжҲҗзӮәйҮҚиҰҒйҒёй …гҖӮ

е…¬еҸёзӣ®еүҚе№ҙеәҰз¶“еёёжҖ§ж”¶е…Ҙе·ІйҒ”12.5е„„зҫҺе…ғпјҢдёҰй җдј°д»Ҡе№ҙж”¶е…ҘеҸҜжңӣйҖІдёҖжӯҘжҲҗй•·иҮі70е„„иҮі90е„„зҫҺе…ғд№Ӣй–“

news.Title: 7е·Ёй ӯжҷӮд»ЈзөӮзөҗпјҹ еӨ–еӘ’жӣқ3жҺҘжЈ’иҖ… 2еӨ§ж–°йңёдё»з·ҠиҝҪеҸ°з©Қйӣ»
news.Content:
йҒҺеҺ»е№ҫе№ҙпјҢзҫҺиӮЎгҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚе№ҫд№Һдё»е°ҺдәҶжЁҷжҷ®500жҢҮж•ёзҡ„жјІеӢўгҖӮдёҚйҒҺпјҢйҡЁи‘—еёӮе ҙй–Ӣе§ӢиіӘз–‘дәәе·Ҙжҷәж…§пјҲAIпјүиғҪеҗҰеҝ«йҖҹиҪүеҢ–зӮәеҜҰйҡӣзҚІеҲ©пјҢеҠ дёҠз¶“жҝҹиҲҮең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»йўЁйҡӘеҚҮй«ҳпјҢиҳӢжһңгҖҒијқйҒ”гҖҒзү№ж–ҜжӢүзӯүйҫҚй ӯиӮЎиҝ‘е№ҫе‘ЁиЎЁзҸҫжҳҺйЎҜиҪүејұпјҢд№ҹи®“жҠ•иіҮеёӮе ҙй–Ӣе§ӢеҮәзҸҫеҗҢдёҖеҖӢе•ҸйЎҢпјҡз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯзҡ„жҷӮд»ЈпјҢжҳҜеҗҰжӯЈеңЁиө°еҗ‘е°ҫиҒІпјҹ

еёӮе ҙжңҖеҸ—й—ңжіЁзҡ„зҫҺиӮЎгҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬иҳӢжһңгҖҒAlphabetгҖҒдәһйҰ¬йҒңгҖҒMetaгҖҒеҫ®и»ҹгҖҒијқйҒ”иҲҮзү№ж–ҜжӢүгҖӮйҖҷдәӣе…¬еҸёжӣҫеӣ AIйЎҢжқҗиҲҮз§‘жҠҖжҲҗй•·иҖҢжҢҒзәҢжҺЁеҚҮиӮЎеғ№пјҢдҪҶеҰӮд»ҠеёӮе ҙе°ҚAIеҜҰйҡӣж”¶зӣҠзҡ„жңҹеҫ…й–Ӣе§ӢйҷҚжә«пјҢдёғе·Ёй ӯиӮЎеғ№д№ҹдёҚеҶҚеғҸйҒҺеҺ»дёҖжЁЈдёҖи·ҜдёҠжјІгҖӮ

еңЁйҖҷжЁЈзҡ„иғҢжҷҜдёӢпјҢзҫҺеңӢжҠ•иіҮеӘ’й«”гҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢй»һеҗҚ3е®¶е…¬еҸёпјҢжңүж©ҹжңғжҲҗзӮәдёӢдёҖжіўз§‘жҠҖиӮЎдё»и§’пјҢеҲҶеҲҘжҳҜеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖҒеҚҡйҖҡиҲҮNebius GroupгҖӮ

еҸ°з©Қйӣ»жҺҢжҸЎAIе‘Ҫи„Ҳ

и«ҮеҲ°AIжҷ¶зүҮпјҢеӨҡж•ёжҠ•иіҮдәәйҰ–е…ҲжғіеҲ°зҡ„д»ҚжҳҜијқйҒ”гҖӮдёҚйҒҺпјҢзңҹжӯЈиІ иІ¬з”ҹз”ўијқйҒ”жҷ¶зүҮпјҢд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–еӨҡе®¶з§‘жҠҖеӨ§е» жҷ¶зүҮзҡ„пјҢе…¶еҜҰжҳҜеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖӮ

з”ұж–јеҸ°з©Қйӣ»дҪҚж–јAIз”ўжҘӯйҸҲжңҖж ёеҝғзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®пјҢеӣ жӯӨеҚідҪҝеёӮе ҙдёҠзҡ„AIжҮүз”ЁжҢҒзәҢж“ҙејөпјҢжңҖзөӮд»ҚжңүеҫҲеӨ§дёҖйғЁеҲҶйңҖжұӮжңғеӣһеҲ°жҷ¶зүҮиЈҪйҖ з«ҜгҖӮйҖҷд№ҹи®“еҸ°з©Қйӣ»жҲҗзӮәAIзҶұжҪ®дёӢзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒеҸ—жғ иҖ…гҖӮ

жӣҙйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„жҳҜпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҡ„жҲҗй•·дёҰдёҚеҸӘдҫҶиҮӘAIгҖӮйҷӨдәҶAIжҷ¶зүҮд№ӢеӨ–пјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»д№ҹжҢҒзәҢз”ҹз”ўжҷәж…§еһӢжүӢж©ҹгҖҒеҖӢдәәйӣ»и…Ұзӯүз”ўе“ҒжүҖйңҖжҷ¶зүҮпјҢжҘӯеӢҷзҜ„еңҚж©«и·ЁеӨҡеҖӢзөӮз«ҜеёӮе ҙгҖӮзӣёијғж–јдҫқиіҙе–®дёҖз”ўе“ҒжҲ–е–®дёҖе®ўжҲ¶зҡ„дјҒжҘӯпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҡ„еёғеұҖжӣҙеҠ еҲҶж•ЈпјҢд№ҹи®“е…¶жңӘдҫҶжҲҗй•·е…·еӮҷжӣҙй«ҳз©©е®ҡжҖ§гҖӮ

гҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢеӣ жӯӨиӘҚзӮәпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»ж—ўжҺҢжҸЎAIи¶ЁеӢўпјҢеҸҲдёҚе®Ңе…ЁеҸ—еҲ¶ж–јAIжҷҜж°ЈеҫӘз’°пјҢжҳҜжңҖжңүж©ҹжңғеңЁдёғе·Ёй ӯд№ӢеҫҢжҢҒзәҢж“ҙеӨ§еҪұйҹҝеҠӣзҡ„е…¬еҸёд№ӢдёҖгҖӮ

еҚҡйҖҡйҒҝй–ӢиҲҮијқйҒ”жӯЈйқўз«¶зҲӯ

еҸҰдёҖе®¶иў«й»һеҗҚзҡ„пјҢжҳҜз¶Іи·ҜиҲҮжҷ¶зүҮеӨ§е» еҚҡйҖҡгҖӮиҲҮијқйҒ”дё»жү“йҖҡз”ЁеһӢAIжҷ¶зүҮдёҚеҗҢпјҢеҚҡйҖҡйҒёж“ҮеҲҮе…Ҙе®ўиЈҪеҢ–жҷ¶зүҮеёӮе ҙгҖӮжҸӣеҸҘи©ұиӘӘпјҢеҚҡйҖҡдёҰйқһиҲҮијқйҒ”зӣҙжҺҘз«¶зҲӯпјҢиҖҢжҳҜйҮқе°ҚдёҚеҗҢе®ўжҲ¶гҖҒдёҚеҗҢз”ЁйҖ”пјҢжҸҗдҫӣе°Ҳй–ҖиЁӯиЁҲзҡ„жҷ¶зүҮж–№жЎҲгҖӮ

йҖҷжЁЈзҡ„зӯ–з•ҘпјҢд№ҹи®“еҚҡйҖҡеңЁAIжөӘжҪ®дёӯжүҫеҲ°еұ¬ж–јиҮӘе·ұзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®гҖӮз•¶и¶ҠдҫҶи¶ҠеӨҡдјҒжҘӯеёҢжңӣжү“йҖ з¬ҰеҗҲиҮӘиә«йңҖжұӮзҡ„AIзі»зөұжҷӮпјҢе®ўиЈҪеҢ–жҷ¶зүҮзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒжҖ§д№ҹйҡЁд№ӢжҸҗй«ҳпјҢеҚҡйҖҡеӣ жӯӨеҸ—жғ гҖӮ

еҚҡйҖҡеңЁжңҖж–°дёҖеӯЈиІЎе ұдёӯй җдј°пјҢеҲ°2027е№ҙпјҢAIжҷ¶зүҮзҮҹж”¶е°Үи¶…йҒҺ1000е„„зҫҺе…ғгҖӮе…¬еҸёеҗҢжҷӮиЎЁзӨәпјҢзӣ®еүҚе®ўжҲ¶йңҖжұӮд»Қз„¶еј·еӢҒпјҢеӣ жӯӨйҖҷй …зӣ®жЁҷдёҰйқһйҒҷдёҚеҸҜеҸҠгҖӮ

зӣёијғж–јеёӮе ҙе°Қдёғе·Ёй ӯжҲҗй•·ж”ҫз·©зҡ„з–‘ж…®пјҢеҚҡйҖҡеҸҚиҖҢеӣ зӮәеҲҮе…ҘдёҚеҗҢеёӮе ҙгҖҒйҒҝй–ӢиҲҮијқйҒ”зЎ¬зў°зЎ¬пјҢиҖҢиў«иҰ–зӮәжӣҙжңүж©ҹжңғжҢҒзәҢеҸ—жғ ж–јAIйңҖжұӮзҡ„дјҒжҘӯгҖӮ

Nebiusе°Ҳж”»AIйӣІз«Ҝ

йҷӨдәҶеӨ§еһӢжҷ¶зүҮе…¬еҸёд№ӢеӨ–пјҢгҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢд№ҹзү№еҲҘй»һеҗҚијғе°‘дәәзҶҹжӮүзҡ„Nebius GroupгҖӮNebiusеұ¬ж–јгҖҢж–°еһӢйӣІз«ҜгҖҚпјҲneocloudпјүй ҳеҹҹзҡ„й ҳе…ҲдјҒжҘӯпјҢдё»иҰҒжҸҗдҫӣAIжҷ¶зүҮиҲҮзӣёй—ңжңҚеӢҷпјҢи®“е®ўжҲ¶еҸҜд»ҘдҫқйңҖжұӮз§ҹз”ЁгҖӮиҲҮдәһйҰ¬йҒңгҖҒеҫ®и»ҹзӯүеӨ§еһӢйӣІз«ҜжңҚеӢҷе•ҶдёҚеҗҢпјҢNebiusдёҰдёҚжҸҗдҫӣе»Јжіӣзҡ„йӣІз«ҜжңҚеӢҷпјҢиҖҢжҳҜе°ҮйҮҚеҝғж”ҫеңЁAIйҒӢз®—е·ҘдҪңиІ ијүгҖӮ

жӯЈеӣ зӮәйҖҷзЁ®е°ҲжіЁзӯ–з•ҘпјҢNebiusеҫ—д»ҘеңЁеёӮе ҙдёӯеҝ«йҖҹе»әз«Ӣе®ҡдҪҚгҖӮз•¶ж„ҲдҫҶж„ҲеӨҡдјҒжҘӯйңҖиҰҒAIз®—еҠӣпјҢдҪҶеҸҲдёҚжғіиҮӘиЎҢиіјиІ·еӨ§йҮҸиЁӯеӮҷжҷӮпјҢNebiusжҸҗдҫӣзҡ„з§ҹз”ЁжЁЎејҸпјҢдҫҝжҲҗзӮәйҮҚиҰҒйҒёй …гҖӮ

е…¬еҸёзӣ®еүҚе№ҙеәҰз¶“еёёжҖ§ж”¶е…Ҙе·ІйҒ”12.5е„„зҫҺе…ғпјҢдёҰй җдј°д»Ҡе№ҙж”¶е…ҘеҸҜжңӣйҖІдёҖжӯҘжҲҗй•·иҮі70е„„иҮі90е„„зҫҺе…ғд№Ӣй–“

news.Title: Big Tech's second quarter just started, and it's already facing major challenges
news.Content: The yearвҖҷs second fiscal quarter is officially underway, and Big Tech is already facing a number of major challenges. ThereвҖҷs the question about when companies will start to see significant returns on the massive sums theyвҖҷre spending on AI data centers; Microsoft ( MSFT ) is contending with its worst stock performance in years; and the war in Iran and resulting fuel crisis continue to suppress shares of some of techвҖҷs biggest names. Take a look at the Magnificent Seven stocks, and youвҖҷll find that each is down following its most recent earnings report, despite the fact that the majority ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Big Tech companies are facing challenges in Q2, including uncertainty regarding returns on substantial AI data center investments.
вҖў Microsoft (MSFT) is experiencing a significant stock price decline, down 22% year-to-date.
вҖў The ongoing war in Iran and resulting fuel crisis are negatively impacting the share prices of major technology firms.
вҖў Investors are questioning the sustainability of AI chip growth and the allocation of massive AI capital expenditures ($650 billion in 2026) by hyperscalers.

news.Title: Micron Is Slumping and RivalвҖҷs $10 Billion US Listing WonвҖҷt Help
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Micron Technology Inc. is having a tough few weeks in the stock market, and the upcoming US listing of South Korean rival SK Hynix Inc. will only add to its challenges. Shares of Micron, the third largest maker of memory chips in the world, blasted out of the gate to start the year, soaring almost 50% in January for the second best performance in the S&P 500 Index. But lately theyвҖҷve been weighed down by concerns about the memory sector and uncertainty in the ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Micron Technology (MU) shares have declined over 20% from recent highs, pressured by memory sector concerns and market uncertainty due to the Iran conflict.
вҖў The upcoming US listing of rival SK Hynix Inc., a key Nvidia supplier, could raise up to $10 billion and impact Micron's market position.
вҖў SK Hynix leads in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) with 57% global revenue share, more than double Micron's.
вҖў While Micron shares trade at a slight premium to SK Hynix, both are inexpensive relative to the S&P 500, and the US listing may narrow valuation gaps.
news.Keywords: memory sector, stock performance, HBM, competitive landscape, valuation, geopolitical uncertainty

news.Title: зҫҺиӮЎеӨ§жҙ—зүҢпјҒгҖҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»пјӢйҖҷ2жӘ”гҖҚиў«й»һеҗҚжңүжңӣжҲҗж–°йңёдё»
news.Content: иІЎз¶“дёӯеҝғпјҸз¶ңеҗҲе ұе°Һ й•·жңҹзөұжІ»зҫҺиӮЎжјІе№…зҡ„гҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚпјҲMagnificent Sevenпјүиҝ‘жңҹйҷ·е…ҘеӢ•зӣӘпјҢеҸ—ең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»з·ҠејөиҲҮAIзҚІеҲ©з–‘ж…®еҪұйҹҝпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬иҳӢжһңгҖҒијқйҒ”гҖҒзү№ж–ҜжӢүеңЁе…§зҡ„ж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎиЎЁзҸҫз–Іи»ҹгҖӮжҠ•иіҮеёӮе ҙй–Ӣе§ӢиіӘз–‘пјҢйҖҷгҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚзөұжІ»зҡ„жҷӮд»ЈгҖҢжҳҜеҗҰе·Іиө°еҗ‘зөӮзөҗпјҹгҖҚе°ҚжӯӨпјҢе°ұжңүеӨ–еӘ’жҢҮеҮәпјҢиӢҘжңӘдҫҶз§‘жҠҖзүҲең–жҙ—зүҢпјҢеҢ…еҗ«еҸ°з©Қйӣ»пјҲTSMCпјүеңЁе…§пјҢгҖҢйҖҷ3еӨ§еҖӢиӮЎгҖҚе°ҮжңүжңӣжҺҘжЈ’жҲҗзӮәж–°йңёдё»гҖӮ й•·жңҹзөұжІ»зҫҺиӮЎжјІе№…зҡ„гҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚпјҲMagnificent Sevenпјүиҝ‘жңҹйҷ·е…ҘеӢ•зӣӘгҖӮпјҲең–пјҸзҝ»ж”қиҮӘиҳӢжһңе®ҳз¶Іпјү ж №ж“ҡ гҖҠThe Motley FoolгҖӢ е ұе°ҺпјҢдёҠиҝ°жҸҗеҸҠзҡ„гҖҢз§‘жҠҖдёғе·Ёй ӯгҖҚеҢ…жӢ¬иҳӢжһңпјҲAppleпјүгҖҒAlphabetпјҲGoogleжҜҚе…¬еҸёпјүгҖҒдәһйҰ¬йҒңпјҲAmazonпјүгҖҒMetaгҖҒеҫ®и»ҹпјҲMicrosoftпјүгҖҒијқйҒ”пјҲNvidiaпјүе’Ңзү№ж–ҜжӢүпјҲTeslaпјүгҖӮз„¶иҖҢпјҢиҝ‘е№ҫйҖұйҖҷдәӣе·Ёй ӯеӣ дәәе·Ҙжҷәж…§пјҲAIпјүзҮҹж”¶зҚІеҲ©зҡ„з–‘ж…®пјҢд»ҘеҸҠж•ҙй«”йҮ‘иһҚеёӮе ҙе°Қз¶“жҝҹе’Ңең°з·Јж”ҝжІ»з’°еўғзҡ„ж“”жҶӮпјҢе°ҺиҮҙиӮЎеғ№иЎЁзҸҫеҸ—жҢ«гҖҒеҒңж»ҜдёҚеүҚгҖӮ зңјзңӢйҖҷдёғе·Ёй ӯзҡ„жҷӮд»ЈеҸҜиғҪжңүзөҗжқҹзҡ„йўЁйҡӘпјҢж–Үз« дёӯд№ҹзү№еҲҘй»һеҗҚдәҶжңүжңӣжҺҘжЈ’жҲҗж–°йңёдё»зҡ„гҖҢ3жӘ”еҖӢиӮЎгҖҚпјҡ 1гҖҒеҸ°з©Қйӣ»пјҲTSMCпјү гҖҢиӯ·еңӢзҘһеұұгҖҚеҸ°з©Қйӣ»дҪңзӮәијқйҒ”зӯүдёҖз·ҡеӨ§е» зҡ„иғҢеҫҢжҺЁжүӢпјҢе…¶й—ңйҚөең°дҪҚз„ЎеҸҜеҸ–д»ЈгҖӮз”ұж–јеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҡ„жҷ¶зүҮжҮүз”Ёе»ЈжіӣпјҢеҫһAIдјәжңҚеҷЁеҲ°ж—ҘеёёдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„жүӢж©ҹгҖҒPC з„ЎжүҖдёҚеҢ…пјҢе…¶жҲҗеҠҹдёҰдёҚдҫ·йҷҗж–је–®дёҖе…¬еҸёжҲ–и¶ЁеӢўпјҢйҖҷзЁ®гҖҢдёҚжҠҠйӣһиӣӢж”ҫеҗҢдёҖеҖӢзұғеӯҗгҖҚзҡ„зӯ–з•ҘпјҢи®“е®ғеңЁAIжҲҗй•·иіҪйҒ“дёӯжӣҙе…·йҳІзҰҰеҠӣиҲҮзҲҶзҷјеҠӣпјҢд№ҹжӢ“еҜ¬дәҶжңӘдҫҶзҡ„зҚІеҲ©ж©ҹжңғгҖӮ еҸ°з©Қйӣ»жҷ¶зүҮжҮүз”Ёе»ЈжіӣпјҢеҫһAIдјәжңҚеҷЁеҲ°ж—ҘеёёдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„жүӢж©ҹгҖҒPC з„ЎжүҖдёҚеҢ…гҖӮпјҲең–пјҸж°‘иҰ–ж–°иҒһз¶Іпјү 2гҖҒеҚҡйҖҡпјҲBroadcomпјү

news.Title: 2 Stock-Split Vanguard Index Funds to Buy Now. History Says They Can Crush the S&P 500 as the AI Boom Unfolds.
news.Content: Vanguard founder John C. Bogle introduced the first index fund in 1976. In doing so, his goal was to provide investors with a more reliable path to creating wealth in the stock market as compared to buying stakes in individual companies. "Don't look for the needle in the haystack," he said. "Just buy the haystack." Today, Vanguard remains a premiere issuer of index funds because ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Vanguard S&P 500 Growth ETF (VOOG) and Vanguard Mega-Cap Growth ETF (MGK) are highlighted for their exposure to key tech stocks and upcoming stock splits.
вҖў VOOG's top holdings include Nvidia (14.1%), Alphabet (10.7%), Microsoft (9.6%), Apple (6.4%), and Broadcom (4.9%).
вҖў MGK's largest holdings are Nvidia (13.1%), Apple (12.5%), Alphabet (10.1%), Microsoft (9.1%), and Meta Platforms (4.6%).
вҖў These tech-heavy ETFs are expected to outperform the S&P 500 due to their concentration in companies poised to benefit from the AI boom.
news.Keywords: index ETFs, stock split, tech sector, AI boom, market outperformance, portfolio concentration

news.Title: The Great Rotation Won't Last Forever. 3 Growth Stocks to Buy Before Tech Rebounds.
news.Content: The S&P 500 blasted higher over the past few years amid excitement about artificial intelligence (AI) companies -- many of these players set the pace, advancing in the double, triple, and quadruple digits. You'll likely recognize some of the names, such as cloud services giant Amazon and AI chip leader Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) . These companies, part of the Magnificent Seven technology stocks, even started to generate significant revenue from the ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Meta Platforms (META) is a dominant social media company with significant AI initiatives aimed at improving its apps and ad performance.
вҖў Trading at 19x forward earnings estimates, Meta is considered the cheapest among the Magnificent Seven stocks.
вҖў Alphabet (GOOGL) is experiencing substantial growth in its Google Cloud division, offering AI and non-AI services.
вҖў Nvidia (NVDA) leads the AI chip market and is committed to annual product updates, including the upcoming Vera Rubin chips.
news.Keywords: social media, AI strategy, stock valuation, cloud growth, AI chips, product development

news.Title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Sells Sandisk Stock and Buys an AI Stock Wall Street Says Is Deeply Undervalued
news.Content: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller ran Duquesne Capital Management between 1981 and 2010. The hedge fund returned about 30% annually without a single down year during that period. Today, Druckenmiller only manages his own money through Duquesne Family Office, and he made some interesting trades in the fourth quarter. He sold his entire stake in Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) , and more than tripled his stake in Google-parent Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) . Will AI create the ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller sold his Sandisk (SNDK) holdings and increased his investment in Alphabet (GOOGL).
вҖў Wall Street analysts generally consider Alphabet undervalued, with a median target price suggesting 30% upside potential.
вҖў Sandisk, a NAND flash memory supplier, reported significant non-GAAP earnings growth of 404% in its most recent quarter.
вҖў Alphabet's investment case is built on its digital advertising and cloud computing businesses, enhanced by AI advancements like its Gemini models.
news.Keywords: investor trades, stock divestment, stock acquisition, valuation, AI capabilities, semiconductor market

news.Title: Jim Cramer Discusses the 90% First Quarter Rally for Lumentum Holdings
news.Content: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LITE ) is among the stocks in focus as Jim Cramer reviewed the S&P 500вҖҷs top performers and the Nasdaq 100вҖҷs biggest laggards for the first quarter . Cramer ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Jim Cramer highlighted Lumentum Holdings (LITE) as the second-best performer in the S&P 500 for Q1, with a 90.7% gain.
вҖў The company's performance is linked to the ongoing AI data center build-out, with Cramer suggesting fiber optics stocks can continue to win.
вҖў Lumentum is a fiber optics play that was recently added to the S&P 500.

news.Keywords: AI, data center, fiber optics, S&P 500, performance

news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Jim Cramer identified Sandisk (SNDK) as the top-performing S&P 500 stock in Q1, with a 167.7% increase.
вҖў The surge is attributed to data center-induced memory shortages, with Sandisk significantly outperforming competitors like Western Digital, Seagate, and Micron.
вҖў Cramer cautioned that the memory industry is inherently boom and bust, and the easy money may have already been made.
вҖў Despite a recent pullback in memory stocks, Sandisk and its peers saw a rally following positive news regarding trade relations.
news.Keywords: AI, memory shortage, data center, boom and bust, performance

news.Title: Tariff Uncertainty Is Back: Why Selling Into the Fear Has Rarely Paid Off
news.Content: Tariffs appear to be back on the menu. Speculation is growing that President Donald Trump may raise tariffs to 15%, with White House trade advisor Peter Navarro recently saying that "it's in the process to happen." The European Union is scrambling to reach a new trade deal; China opened an ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў The article discusses the potential impact of tariffs on the stock market, suggesting that selling into fear has rarely paid off.
вҖў It notes that the S&P 500 has performed well long-term, up 60% over the past five years, despite short-term headwinds like tariffs.
вҖў Tariffs are described as short-term headwinds that do not change the fundamentals of most companies and industries, including AI.
вҖў The article suggests focusing on fundamentals and ignoring noise, as AI stocks saw long-term growth despite previous tariff-related volatility.
news.Keywords: Tariffs, market volatility, long-term investment, fundamentals, AI

news.Title: Got $1,000? This Agentic AI Growth Stock Is Down 87% From Its Highs
news.Content: If you hear the experts talk about it, this is the heyday for agentic artificial intelligence (AI) -- programs that can make decisions and perform tasks on their own. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang calls it an "inflection point" for AI. A survey of business executives conducted by International Business Machines projects expectations that fully autonomous robotic systems will ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў The article discusses agentic AI and highlights UiPath (PATH) as a stock down 87% from its highs, dropping over 35% in 2026.
вҖў UiPath develops software for automating repetitive office tasks, with Q4 fiscal 2026 revenue of $481 million (up 14% YoY) and net income of $104.5 million (up from $51.8 million).
вҖў Annual recurring revenue is $1.85 billion, up 11% from a year ago.
вҖў Analysts project only a 24% potential gain, and the author expresses a lack of confidence in UiPath's position to ride the agentic AI wave.
news.Keywords: Agentic AI, automation, RPA, stock performance, AI infrastructure

news.Title: Nebius Stock Jumped 15% on Its Meta Deal. Is This the Next CoreWeave -- or Something Better?
news.Content: Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) and CoreWeave (NASDAQ: CRWV) are operating in the same space. They both provide graphics processing unit (GPU)-accelerated cloud infrastructure that their customers can use to design, train, and run artificial intelligence (AI)-powered programs. CoreWeave is the bigger of the two, with a market capitalization of $40.7 billion versus Nebius Group's $25.2 billion valuation. But Nebius has the advantage of growing faster. Nebius stock is up nearly 400% in the last 12 months, soundly beating CoreWeave's gain ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Nebius Group (NBIS) and CoreWeave (CRWV) provide GPU-accelerated cloud infrastructure for AI.
вҖў Nebius stock is up nearly 400% in 12 months, beating CoreWeave's 109% gain.
вҖў Nebius secured a five-year AI infrastructure deal with Meta Platforms worth up to $27 billion.
вҖў CoreWeave's Q4 2025 revenue was $1.57 billion (up 110% YoY), but it posted an adjusted net loss of $284 million.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, GPU, cloud computing, data center, stock performance

news.Title: Peloton Is Moving in the Right Direction, But It Still Has to Solve This 1 Problem
news.Content: On some levels, fiscal 2025 was a good year for Peloton Interactive (NASDAQ: PTON) . It improved its margins, strengthened its balance sheet, and reduced its per-share loss. The positive trends largely continued into the first half of fiscal 2026. And yet there's one lingering negative ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Peloton (PTON) showed some positive trends in fiscal 2025 and early fiscal 2026, improving margins and strengthening its balance sheet.
вҖў However, its paid subscriber base fell 11% in fiscal 2025, with continued losses in H1 fiscal 2026, which is a significant concern as subscriptions account for nearly 63% of revenue.
вҖў The company is incorporating AI capabilities into its products and launching commercial equipment.
вҖў Despite efforts to turn the business around, the declining subscriber count poses a long-term problem.
news.Keywords: Subscription revenue, subscriber decline, AI integration, business turnaround, margins

news.Title: Got $5,000? 5 Agentic AI Growth Stocks to Buy Before Wall Street Catches On.
news.Content: The next big thing in artificial intelligence (AI) is here, and it has the potential to be the next megatrend that can power the market higher over the next few years. That, of course, is agentic AI , where AI moves beyond creating content to independently executing tasks. The best thing about this trend, though, is that Wall Street hasn't yet fully caught on to its potential. There are several ways to play this agentic AI megatrend, and with ...

news.Title: Prediction: Tesla Stock Is a Buy Before 2029 Due to This $10 Trillion Opportunity
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is struggling when it comes to automotive sales. Last year, EV sales nationwide fell by roughly 2%. Tesla's auto deliveries, however, fell by around 9%.
